title: Technical Performance Marketing Specialist (Google PPC + Meta Ads + Web Tracking)
description:
Job Description



Technical Performance Marketing Specialist (Google PPC + Meta Ads + Web Tracking)



We are looking for a highly technical Performance Marketing Specialist to manage and optimize our Google Ads, Meta 
/Instagram) Ads, and website tracking systems.



Our company is Singapore-based and operates in the real estate industry. We rely heavily on online marketing to generate high-quality leads from platforms such as Google,
, Instagram, and property portals.

This role is not a typical ads manager role. We are specifically looking for someone with a strong technical and IT background who understands tracking, automation, landing page optimization, and ad testing frameworks.

Your role is to ensure our advertising system runs efficiently, is properly tracked, and constantly optimized through data and testing.



If you enjoy working with data, code, analytics, and marketing performance optimization, this role will be a strong fit.



What You’ll Do

Advertising Management



• Manage and optimize Google PPC campaigns (Search, Display, Retargeting)

• Manage Meta Ads campaigns 
 / Instagram)

• Perform A/B testing on ads, audiences, creatives, and landing pages

• Improve cost-per-lead (CPL) and conversion rates



Tracking & Data Infrastructure

• Setup and maintain Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, and Meta Pixel

• Configure conversion tracking across websites and landing pages

• Ensure accurate lead attribution across all ad platforms

• Diagnose tracking issues and ensure data accuracy



Technical Optimization

• Work with landing pages and website forms to improve conversion

• Optimize page loading speed and mobile responsiveness

• Implement event tracking, pixels, and API integrations

• Build and maintain tracking dashboards



Automation & Testing



• Develop structured ad testing frameworks

• Use automation tools or scripts to improve ad management efficiency

• Continuously analyze data to identify scaling opportunities



Website & Funnel Support



• Manage landing pages used for ad campaigns

• Optimize lead capture funnels

• Ensure smooth integration between ads ? landing page ? CRM



Technical Requirements (Important)



Applicants must have technical background in IT, coding, or web development.



Required skills:



• Experience managing Google Ads & Meta Ads campaigns

• Knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM)

• Experience with Google Analytics (GA4)

• Understanding of tracking pixels and conversion APIs

• Ability to troubleshoot tracking or ad performance issues



Technical background preferred:



• Basic coding knowledge (HTML / CSS / JavaScript)

• Experience with website CMS platforms (WordPress, Webflow, etc.)

• Experience integrating web forms and CRM systems

• Understanding of website performance optimization



Bonus Skills (Strong Advantage)



• Experience with real estate lead generation campaigns

• Familiar with automation tools (Zapier, Make, API integrations)

• Experience using AI tools for marketing optimization

• Experience building landing pages optimized for PPC conversions

• Knowledge of SQL or data analysis tools



Work Setup



• Fully remote role

• Flexible working environment

• Must be responsive during campaign launches and testing phases





Why Join our team/benefits?

• Short Term Incentives

• End-of-year bonus

• Annual Increment (Guaranteed)

• Work from Home fully

• Learn Real Estate Industry (APAC)

• Travel Incentives*



Our Goal for This Role



We want this role to help us:

• Generate high-quality property leads consistently

• Reduce cost-per-lead through technical optimization

• Build a scalable marketing system using data and automation

title: Account Manager
description:
Internal Team Lead & Client Account Manager

We are looking for a well-rounded professional who can manage client relationships, lead a team, and contribute to business growth — all with the confidence of someone who has done it before.



This role sits at the intersection of people and performance. You will be the main contact for our clients, ensuring they consistently receive value and feel heard. At the same time, you will be guiding and supporting our VA team, addressing their concerns and helping them grow. If you thrive in a role where communication, leadership, and initiative all matter equally, this is an excellent fit.



Your Responsibilities:

•Manage and develop client accounts with a focus on satisfaction and retention

•Serve as the first point of contact for client concerns and resolve issues professionally

•Identify opportunities to expand services and grow accounts through thoughtful upselling

•Coach VAs and help them navigate challenges in client relationships

•Keep internal systems and processes running efficiently

•Report on team and client performance with a focus on continuous improvement

What We're Looking For:

•Strong leadership qualities with experience supporting or managing a team

•Excellent English communication skills — clear, professional, and confident

•A proactive, flexible approach and willingness to work outside regular hours when required



Preferred:

-Background in virtual team management

-HR or recruitment experience

What You Can Expect:

-A role with genuine variety and real responsibility

-The opportunity to make a meaningful contribution to clients and colleagues alike

-A team that values both professional excellence and human connection

-Room to grow within account management and team leadership



If you are ready to lead, connect, and grow — we would love to hear from you. Apply now.

description:

 Response & Lead Qualifier) – Remote

title: Senior Amazon Catalog & Operations Lead (Full-Time / Exclusive)
description:
We are a U.S. Amazon brand in the personalized products space. We are looking for a meticulous Amazon Operations Lead to take full ownership of our Catalog, Account Health, and Visual Integrity.



This is an execution and maintenance role. Strategy (SEO/PPC) is handled by other departments. Your mission is to ensure our listings are technically perfect, 100% compliant, and visually superior.



The Mission

1. Catalog & Technical Mastery

Total Ownership: Build and manage complex parent-child variation families with 100?curacy.



The "Fixer": Use advanced flat files (mandatory skill) to resolve suppressed listings, "Detail Page Removed" errors, and stranded inventory.



Listing Implementation: Execute updates to Titles, Bullets, and Backend terms based on provided SEO directives, ensuring every change is live and indexed.



Account Health Defense: Monitor the AHR dashboard daily. You are our first line of defense, preventing violations before they happen and writing professional, data-driven appeals (POAs) when necessary.



2. Visual Stewardship & Conversion

Image Strategy: You don't need to be a designer, but you must have a "high-level eye" for what converts on Amazon.



Creative Liaison: Conduct image audits, analyze competitor visuals, and create detailed briefs for our design team (Infographics, Lifestyle, A+ Content).



Execution: Coordinate with photographers and designers to ensure brand consistency and compliance with Amazon’s strict style guides.



Mapping: Manage the technical upload and mapping of all visual assets, including Brand Stories and Premium A+.



3. Seller Central Operations

Brand Registry: Handle all Brand Registry-related issues and protection.



Case Management: Open and relentlessly follow up on Seller Support cases until resolved.



Compliance: Ensure 100?tegory and attribute accuracy to maximize browse-tree visibility.



Required Expertise

3+ Years Experience: Verifiable, hands-on management of Amazon Seller Central (U.S. Marketplace).



Flat File Mastery: You must be able to navigate a Category Template in your sleep.



Visual Logic: Ability to critique an image stack and explain why it will or won’t convert a customer.



Policy Fluency: Deep understanding of Amazon’s Terms of Service and how to navigate "grey area" violations.



Communication: Native-level written English for professional appeals and designer briefs.



Full Exclusivity: This is a full-time commitment. We do not engage with agencies or individuals servicing multiple clients.



Compensation

Above-Market Base Salary: We pay for focus, commitment, and elite-level execution.



Performance Bonuses: Based on catalog health and conversion metrics.



Long-Term Growth: Opportunity to move into a Senior Operations/Director role.



How to Apply (Strict Requirements)

We are building a serious operation. If you are "average," please do not apply. To be considered, you must provide:



The "CATALOG OWNER" Video: Record a 3–5 minute Loom video reviewing a listing you managed.



Show us a complex variation or technical issue you resolved.

Critique the imagery: What specific instructions would you give a designer to improve that listing's conversion rate?

The "Crisis" Story: Describe the most difficult policy violation or listing takedown you successfully overturned. What was your logic?

Your Portfolio: A link to your CV/Resume with a clear work history.

The Commitment: Confirm your expected monthly salary and that you are available for an exclusive, full-time engagement.

title: Media Buyer (META) Facebook Dropshipping for E-Commerce Company -
description:
Media Buyer for E-Commerce Company (Dropshipping)



About Us:

We are U-S Limited, a fast-growing e-commerce company running multiple successful dropshipping stores. We test 30+ ad campaigns daily on
 and Instagram to identify high-performing products and scale ads.



The Role:

We’re looking for a proactive, results-driven Media Buyer who will not just follow instructions but help drive the company’s growth. You’ll be expected to think critically, find your own solutions, and actively contribute to scaling and optimizing our ad campaigns. If you're a fast thinker, deeply invested in the success of the company, and passionate about building solutions together, we want to hear from you.



Your Responsibilities:

• Analyze Data – Track ad performance and make quick, data-driven decisions.

• Kill or Scale Ads – Identify which ads should be stopped or scaled based on performance.

• Test 50+ Products Daily – Manage and optimize new ad campaigns every day.

• Audience Targeting – Research and refine high-converting audiences.

• Budget Optimization – Allocate ad spend for maximum return on investment.

• Real-Time Adjustments – Make quick adjustments to maintain ad performance, 24/7.

• Collaborate with CEO – Work directly with the CEO to define strategy and drive results.

• Think and Act Proactively – Be an active problem-solver and help identify new opportunities for growth.



What We Need:

• Proven, recent experience running
 & Instagram ads for dropshipping brands.

• Recent proof of successful ad campaigns (case studies, performance data, or documents).

• A fast learner, quick thinker, and self-starter with a hands-on attitude.

• Experience managing 50+ campaigns daily and making real-time decisions.

• Strong communication skills – able to work closely with the CEO and provide clear updates.

• Someone who is highly proactive, with a passion for helping the company grow.

• Availability to make 24/7 adjustments to campaigns as needed.

• We do not accept AI-generated applications. If we detect AI in your response, we will ignore it.



What’s In It For You:

• High-performance pay – directly tied to your results.

• Unlimited earning potential – the better your ads perform, the more you earn.

• Opportunity for rapid growth – successful candidates will move into management roles.

• Remote work – work from anywhere, but be available when needed.



How to Apply:

To apply, send us:

1. Your resume.

2. Recent proof of successful ad campaigns you’ve run (include data).

3. Examples of your experience running Meta ads for dropshipping brands (provide links or proof).

4. Note: If you don’t provide your resume and proof, or if we detect AI in your application, your submission will be ignored.



Fun Challenge: To prove you’ve read the full post, include the word "RED" in your application.

title: Operation & Sales Associate
description:
one Wolf Enterprise is a high-growth car rental business. We currently manage a 25-car fleet and are scaling to 50+ vehicles by August 2026. We are not looking for a "freelancer"—we are looking for a dedicated partner to grow with us.



Note: We provide full training on GoHighLevel (GHL) and Square. You do not need prior experience with these tools, but you must be a fast learner.



Key Responsibilities

Fleet & Maintenance Management:

-- Maintain a real-time log of all 25+ vehicles (scaling to 50).

-- Track vehicle status: Know exactly which cars are available, rented, or under maintenance.

-- Monitor maintenance schedules, specifically tracking oil changes and routine service.

-- Keep detailed digital files on all client information and rental agreements.



Financial Oversight & Collections:

-- Daily Audit: Monitor Square to ensure all current renters are up to date on payments.

-- Reporting: Immediately report any missed or late payments directly to the Manager.

-- Manage business receipts and ensure all invoicing is accurate.



Sales & Pipeline Management (GHL):

-- Qualify inbound leads and move them through the GHL "Opportunities" pipeline.

-- Conduct inbound/outbound calls to close deals and maintain high fleet utilization.

-- Contact "waitlist" leads the 
nt a vehicle becomes available.



Social Media & Marketing:

-- Create and schedule engaging
 posts and content for our social media pages.



Requirements

-- TOTAL EXCLUSIVITY: This is a "Period" requirement. You must work exclusively for Lone Wolf Enterprise. You are prohibited from having other clients or side jobs. This is a legal requirement that must be signed in your employment letter.

-- Extreme Organization: You will be responsible for the data of 50 vehicles; attention to detail is non-negotiable.

-- Sales-Minded: Comfortable talking to clients and "closing" the rental.

-- Fluent English: High-level spoken and written English for professional communication.

-- Availability: Must work strictly within EST Business Hours.



Why Join Lone Wolf?

-- Paid Training: We teach you GHL, Square, and fleet management systems.

-- Massive Growth: We are doubling our fleet in the next few months; this role has a clear path to Full-Time and Leadership.

-- Stability: Yearly performance-based raises.

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Technical Virtual Assistant to help us execute technical tasks by following very detailed step-by-step SOPs.



The work mainly involves setting up servers and basic technical configurations by following clear instructions.



You do not need to invent anything or be an expert developer.



Your job is simply to follow the instructions exactly as written and complete the tasks.



This role is ideal for someone who:



enjoys structured work



follows instructions carefully



is comfortable using online tools and basic server dashboards



wants to learn more about technical systems and automation



Responsibilities



Typical tasks may include:



following step-by-step SOPs to set up servers



performing basic technical configurations



updating simple tracking sheets



reporting completed tasks



notifying us if a step cannot be completed



All instructions will be provided in clear SOP documents.



Work Conditions



Fully remote



Flexible schedule



No fixed working hours



Approximately 2 hours per day



The main requirement is simply to complete the assigned tasks



Compensation



€2 per hour



Approximately 2 hours per day



Potential for long-term work if performance is good



Requirements



Good written English



Strong attention to detail



Ability to follow instructions exactly



Reliable internet connection



Own computer



Comfortable working with technical instructions



Basic familiarity with servers, hosting, or technical tools is a plus, but not required.



Important



To confirm that you carefully read this job post, please start your application with the word:



SMTP



Applications that do not include this word will not be considered.



Application Test



After answering the questions below, please also complete this short test:



Go to MXToolbox



Open the SMTP Test tool



Test the domain 



Attach a screenshot of the result



Write one short sentence explaining what the test shows



Applications without this test will not be considered.



How to Apply



Please answer the following questions in your application:



Do you currently have another job? If yes, where are you working and how many hours per week?



How much money (in USD) would you like to earn per month in this role?



Have you worked for foreign (non-local) employers before? Briefly describe.



How long have you been doing Virtual Assistant work?



Do you have your own computer and reliable Internet? List your computer specs and attach a recent Speedtest screenshot.



Will you work from home, a coworking space, or an Internet café?



Where are you located (city + country) and what is your current time-zone offset from UTC?



Provide three professional references and links or files showing your best work 
 replies, chat logs, reports — feel free to redact sensitive data).



Write one short paragraph explaining why we should hire you (no bullet points — tell us your story).



When could you start if selected?

title: Operations Executive Assistant – Data & Reporting | $1000
description:
We’re hiring an Operations Executive Assistant (Data & Reporting) for our insurance district headquarters to directly support our District Distribution Manager and take ownership of reporting, tracking, and administrative coordination.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with spreadsheets, organizing data, and supporting leadership through accurate reporting and structured processes.



What You’ll Do

• Create and maintain reports using Excel and Google Sheets

• Track performance data and ensure reporting accuracy

• Manage calendars, meetings, and executive admin tasks

• Build and improve spreadsheet templates and trackers

• Support daily operational and administrative needs



Requirements

• Advanced Excel and Google Sheets skills

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Experience supporting a manager or executive

• Clear written and spoken English

• Ability to work independently and stay organized

• 2+ years directly supporting an Executive



Work Details

• Pay: $1000/month

• Type: Full-time, long-term

• Work Setup: Remote

• Commitment: No other active jobs



How to Apply - Please send:

1. A short summary of your admin and reporting experience

2. Tools you’ve used (Excel, Google Sheets, dashboards, etc.)

3. Your updated CV

4. Confirmation of full-time availability

title: Real Estate Assistant Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are looking for an Assistant Real Estate Transaction Coordinator to assist our team to manage real estate transactions from contract to closing, primarily in the California, Texas and Florida markets.



Although this is an assistant position to start, it can quickly grow into a TC position and even leadership on our team for someone who proves themselves.



*PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND MAKE SURE YOU ARE QUALIFIED*



*MUST BE AVAILABLE TO START IMMEDIATELY and must be available to work Monday - Friday, 8:30 am - 5:30 pm Pacific Standard Time (PST).



This role is critical to ensuring smooth, compliant, and stress-free transactions for our real estate agents and clients. The ideal candidate has prior experience coordinating real estate transactions, understands contracts and timelines, and is comfortable working inside multiple real estate systems.



If you are detail-oriented, proactive, and enjoy managing processes and communication, this is a long-term opportunity with a growing real estate operations company.



Required Qualifications:



- Minimum 1+ year experience coordinating or assisting on California real estate transactions and contracts. *THIS IS A MUST*

- Strong understanding of real estate contracts and disclosures, specifically California (other states a plus)

- Experience using transaction management or CRM platforms such as: SkySlope, A-Frame, Lofty, or similar real estate systems

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to manage multiple transactions simultaneously

- Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup, including backup power and ineternet.

- Ability to work independently while collaborating with a team



This is a Full-time remote position working Monday - Friday, 8:30 - 5:30 pm U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST).



Key Responsibilities:



- Assist our team to manage real estate transactions from executed contract through closing

- Review contracts and disclosures for accuracy and completeness

- Ensure compliance with real estate requirements and timelines

- Coordinate communication between agents, clients, lenders, escrow officers, and vendors

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and required documentation

- Upload and manage files within transaction management platforms

- Maintain accurate transaction records and status updates

- Provide excellent client and agent support throughout the transaction process

- Identify opportunities to improve workflows and efficiency



Long-term opportunity with growth potential.



Must be able to provide verifiable references.



Competitive compensation based on experience.

title: Social Media Content Manager (Real Estate Personal Brand)
description:
We are looking for a creative and proactive Social Media Content Manager to help grow our personal brand and online presence in the real estate industry. Can speak. Understand and read Mandarin is a plus! 



Our company is Singapore-based, and we help clients buy, sell, and rent properties. As our business grows, we want to build strong authority across multiple social media platforms to attract inbound leads and listing opportunities.

This role focuses on short-form video content, social media growth, and platform management. You will help turn property listings, insights, and market knowledge into engaging content that attracts buyers, sellers, and investors.

We are building a long-term team with strong systems, content workflows, and SOPs. If you enjoy content creation, storytelling, and growing online brands, we would love to have you onboard.

________________________________________

What You’ll Do

Content Creation

• Edit short-form property videos for social media platforms

• Turn raw property footage into engaging Reels / Shorts / TikTok style content

• Add subtitles, music, transitions, and captions to improve engagement

• Create simple visuals or graphics using Canva or similar tools

Social Media Management

Manage and post content across the following platforms:

• Instagram

• TikTok

• Xiao Hong Shu (RED / ???)

•

• Lemon8

• WeChat Channels

• YouTube (Shorts + long-form if applicable)

Responsibilities include:

• Uploading and scheduling content

• Writing captions and hashtags

• Monitoring comments and engagement

• Responding or flagging potential leads

Content Planning

• Plan and maintain a weekly/monthly content calendar

• Suggest new content ideas based on trending formats and platform algorithms

• Repurpose content across multiple platforms

Brand Growth

• Help grow our real estate personal brand online

• Identify content opportunities that attract buyers, sellers, landlords, and investors

• Support content that builds trust, authority, and visibility



Good with “content distribution”.

Meaning:

1 video ? posted across 7 platforms with different formatting

Example:

• TikTok ? hook based

• Instagram ? lifestyle focus

• XiaoHongShu ? educational

• YouTube ? SEO title

•
 ? longer captions



________________________________________

Requirements

• Laptop + stable internet connection

• Experience managing multiple social media platforms

• Strong short-form video editing skills

• Familiar with tools such as CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

• Good understanding of social media algorithms and trends

• Organized and able to maintain a content calendar

________________________________________

Bonus Skills (Strong Advantage)

• Experience managing Xiao Hong Shu / Lemon8 / WeChat Channels

• Experience editing property or real estate videos

• Familiar with Canva design

• Knowledge of viral content formats and storytelling

• Experience using AI tools for editing, captions, or content ideation

________________________________________

Work Setup

• Fully remote (Work From Home)

• Flexible working environment

• Must be responsive for content scheduling and posting





Why Join Our Team / Benefits

• Work fully remote

• Learn the Real Estate Industry in Singapore / APAC

• Opportunity to build and grow a strong real estate personal brand

• Performance incentives based on growth and results

• Long-term opportunity as the brand and business scale





Our Goal for This Role

This role will help us:

• Build authority across multiple social media platforms

• Generate organic inbound leads

• Attract property sellers and investors through social media

• Establish a trusted and recognizable real estate brand online

title: Client Service Representative (Bilingual English/Spanish)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Client Service Representative to join our dynamic and growing team. The ideal candidate is well-spoken, professional, and experienced in executive-level or managerial environments, with exceptional interpersonal and communication skills in both English and Spanish. This role requires a strong ability to manage client relationships while handling contract-related responsibilities with accuracy and confidence.



Key Responsibilities



Analyze, review, and manage contract agreements

Serve as the primary point of contact for all client inquiries

Communicate professionally with clients in English and Spanish as needed

Ensure contract compliance and identify, address, and resolve discrepancies

Provide clear and professional explanations regarding contract terms and conditions

Collaborate with internal and external teams to resolve client or contract-related issues

Maintain a high standard of client satisfaction through proactive communication



Requirements



Fluent in English and Spanish (spoken and written)

Well-spoken, professional, and confident communicator

Managerial or executive-level experience is required

Minimum 1–2 year commitment

Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build and maintain long-term client relationships

Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Exceptional listening skills to fully understand client needs

Strong problem analysis and problem-solving abilities

Customer service–oriented mindset with a strong focus on client satisfaction

Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)



What We Offer



Competitive salary

Growth and professional development opportunities

Supportive and collaborative team environment



Working Hours



Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

Possible weekend hours as needed



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To be considered, you must include:



A link to your 2-minute introduction video

A brief description of your past work experience, highlighting any managerial or executive-level roles

Applications that do not include the required video link will not be reviewed.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) + WordPress Systems VA  (Funnels, Automations, Integrations, Email Fix)
description:
Type: Hourly — Full-Time preferred (40 hrs/week) or Part-Time (20 hrs/week)

Schedule: Flexible hours except mandatory 8:30 AM CST daily tea
eting (15–30 minutes)

READ THE ENTIRE JOB POST, OR YOU WILL NOT BE INTERVIEWED!

About Us



We operate a high-volume lead business. My services include business funding, credit repair, business credit building, and business coaching. Your job is to keep our GoHighLevel + WordPress (Bluehost) systems running smoothly and consistently. We need a reliable operator who can build funnels and automations, troubleshoot issues fast, and improve system quality so leads don’t get missed.



This is not a beginner VA role. This is a systems + implementation role.



What You Own (Outcomes)



Website pages + landing pages are updated, mobile-clean, and stable



Funnels are built correctly and connect to GHL cleanly



Automations route leads, assign ownership, follow up, and notify the team correctly



Integrations do not break (Zapier/webhooks/forms)



/SMS deliverability is set up correctly and monitored



Everything is documented (Loom + simple SOP)



Key Responsibilities

1) GoHighLevel (Core)



Build and maintain: funnels, forms, surveys, calendars, pipelines



Build and maintain: workflows/automations (tagging, lead routing, follow-up sequences, round-robin logic, tasks, notifications)



Troubleshoot and fix: missed assignments, broken triggers, failed appointment bookings, duplicate records, workflow conflicts



QA testing: verify every funnel/form produces the correct outcome end-to-end



Maintain organized tags, custom fields, pipeline stages, and automation naming conventions



2) WordPress (Bluehost) + Website Updates



Create/update landing pages and website pages in WordPress



Basic layout edits (sections, forms, buttons, mobile formatting)



Basic speed/hygiene tasks (plugins updated safely, backups before edits, reduce obvious bloat)



Connect WordPress forms/pages to GHL properly



3) Integrations + Lead Delivery (Plus)



Connect & test integrations: Zapier, webhooks, LeadConnector forms



Experience with lead sources is a plus: LendingTree / SoFi / third-party lead delivery



If you understand Google Ads tracking basics (GTM, conversion events) — big plus



4)
 Deliverability + Light IT (Required / Plus)



We have
 that needs fixing now. You must understand the basics of:



SMTP/email connection inside GHL



SPF/DKIM/DMARC concepts (at least troubleshooting-level)



DNS knowledge is a plus (GoDaddy), not daily work



Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)



GoHighLevel advanced (workflows, funnels, calendars, pipelines, tags, custom fields)



WordPress competence (pages/landing pages/edits + Bluehost familiarity)



Strong troubleshooting (you can find why something broke without being babysat)



Documentation habit: Loom videos + short SOPs



Reliable communication and consistent output (we value diligence)



Bonus Skills (Preferred)



Zapier + webhooks experience



LendingTree/SoFi lead delivery experience



Google Ads tracking experience (GTM/conversion tracking)



DNS/SSL comfort (GoDaddy/Cloudflare)



 deliverability troubleshooting experience



Performance Standards (KPIs)



QA cadence: weekly checklist completed (funnels, forms, calendars, workflows tested)



Turnaround: normal tasks completed within 24–48 hours depending on size



System reliability: no repeated issues from the same root cause



Documentation: every major build/change includes Loom + short SOP



Hiring Filters (Read Carefully)



To apply, you must submit:



Loom video (3–5 minutes) showing:



A workflow you built in GHL (explain the logic)



How you test it end-to-end



A quick WordPress page you edited/built (explain what you changed)



Answer these questions in your application:



What’s your GHL skill level from 1–10 and why?



What’s your WordPress skill level from 1–10 and why?



Have you fixed
 deliverability issues before? Yes/No — explain briefly



Have you used Zapier/webhooks? Yes/No — explain briefly



Your hourly rate + weekly availability



Attention Test: Put “GHL+WP OPERATOR” in the first line of your application.



First 7 Days (Paid Trial Expectations)



Audit our current GHL setup (funnels, workflows, calendars, pipelines)



Fix the current
 issue (deliverability/configuration)



Run end-to-end tests on lead capture ? assignment ? follow-up ? booking



Create a simple weekly QA checklist + change log



Deliver Loom documentation for everything you touched



Why This Role Exists



We need someone consistent, diligent, and organized. You will be working in production systems where leads matter. 

Auto-clickers are not tolerated. Hubstaff time tracking is mandatory. Pay is weekly.

title: Multi-Media Designer (Urgent) - Strong background in UI/UX design with hands-on experience in Figma
description:
Travelshift, the company behind Guide to Iceland and Guide to Europe, is looking for a creative and versatile Multi-Media Designer to join our team. This is a key role where you’ll bring together design, storytelling, and technology to shape how millions of travelers experience our platforms.



What you’ll do:

Design engaging, user-friendly UX/UI experiences in Figma.

Work closely with product and marketing teams to create cohesive, on-brand visuals across web, app, and social platforms.

Produce and edit video content for campaigns, ads, and product storytelling.

Experiment with and implement AI tools to streamline workflows and support scalable, high-quality content creation.

Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure our design language elevates both functionality and brand identity.



What we’re looking for:

Strong background in UI/UX design with hands-on experience in Figma.

Skills in video editing (motion graphics a plus).

A curious mindset and experience in using AI tools to enhance and automate parts of the creative process.

A portfolio that demonstrates versatility across digital design and multimedia.



How to apply:

Send us your CV and a link to your portfolio showcasing your best work at 
 indicate your availability and monthly and hourly rate if possible.

title: Remote Client Services Representative
description:
We are currently seeking a qualified and dependable Client Services Representative to support daily client communications and service operations. This position requires a high level of professionalism, attention to detail, and adherence to established company policies and procedures. The successful candidate will be responsible for providing accurate information, managing client inquiries, and maintaining detailed records of all interactions.



Primary Responsibilities

Respond to client inquiries through approved communication channels in a professional, accurate, and timely manner.

Review, document, and track service requests to ensure proper follow-up and resolution.

Provide clear guidance regarding company services, policies, and procedures.

Coordinate with internal departments to facilitate the timely resolution of client concerns.

Escalate complex or unresolved matters to designated supervisory personnel when required.

Maintain accurate records of communications and actions taken within internal systems.

Comply with all company policies, confidentiality requirements, and applicable data protection regulations.

Minimum Qualifications

Strong written and verbal communication skills.

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple tasks while maintaining attention to detail.

Professional and responsible work ethic.

Basic proficiency with standard computer systems and digital communication tools.

Prior experience in client service, administrative support, or a related field is preferred but not mandatory.

Employment Terms

This is a remote position and requires reliable internet access and an appropriate work environment.

Compensation will be determined based on qualifications, experience, and applicable company pay structures.

title: Lead Generation Specialist / Business Development Representative
description:
We’re looking for a motivated and results-driven Lead Generation Specialist to help grow our sales pipeline and expand our customer base. As a BDR, you’ll be on the front lines of our sales efforts, identifying potential clients, generating leads, and nurturing opportunities to connect them with our solutions.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Proactively research and identify potential customers in target markets.

2. Reach out to prospects via
s, LinkedIn, and other communication channels.

3. Qualify leads to assess fit and interest, ensuring alignment with our services.

4. Schedule meetings or product demos between qualified leads and Sales Development Representatives.

5. Maintain accurate records of lead interactions and update CRM systems accordingly.

6. Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to execute campaigns and optimize lead generation strategies.

7. Stay up-to-date on industry trends and our product/service offerings to effectively communicate value propositions.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

- 2 - 3 years of experience in sales, business development, or a similar role (entry-level candidates with strong communication skills and a hunger to learn are also encouraged to apply).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build rapport quickly.

- Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and eager to exceed targets.

- Proficiency in extracting data from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other professional networks

- Must have a well-optimized LinkedIn account with atleast a minimum of 300 connections that can be used for prospecting

- Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, PipeDrive) is a plus.

- Comfortable with cold outreach and prospecting.



Who we are:

Acadium started with the belief that anyone, anywhere, should be able to get the skills and experience they need to start their career without barriers like price, schedule, or location getting in their way. Acadium gives anyone the tools, support, and mentorship they need to launch their dream career. Acadium is the only platform that provides real work experience, accessible to everyone. Acadium began in 2017 with a team of 3 co-founders: Richard Shaw, Marco Tundo, and Moe Abbas. Since then, they’ve attracted more than 120,000 student members and over 50,000 businesses to connect through the apprenticeship marketplace. Our team is growing and looking for people who are motivated, intelligent, and committed to making education accessible to join our team.



What we value:

Integrity - Be trustworthy in your actions

Care - Treat your teammates and our community as you would want to be treated

Curiosity - Ask questions. Always state your assumptions

Tenacity - Persevere when times are tough

Discipline - Be consistent in your actions

Ambition - Aspire to become better every day

Service -Serve your community to the best of your abilities.



Interested applicants may send updated CVs and LinkedIn URLs with a minimum of 300 connections to 

 Subject: [Adjective that describes you] B2B Lead Generation Specialist

**Note: Only applicants who submit their resumes and LinkedIn URL will be evaluated.

- Must have a well-optimized LinkedIn account with atleast a minimum of 300 connections that can be used for prospecting

- Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, PipeDrive) is a plus.

- Comfortable with cold outreach and prospecting.



Who we are:

Acadium started with the belief that anyone, anywhere, should be able to get the skills and experience they need to start their career without barriers like price, schedule, or location getting in their way. Acadium gives anyone the tools, support, and mentorship they need to launch their dream career. Acadium is the only platform that provides real work experience, accessible to everyone. Acadium began in 2017 with a team of 3 co-founders: Richard Shaw, Marco Tundo, and Moe Abbas. Since then, they’ve attracted more than 120,000 student members and over 50,000 businesses to connect through the apprenticeship marketplace. Our team is growing and looking for people who are motivated, intelligent, and committed to making education accessible to join our team.



What we value:

Integrity - Be trustworthy in your actions

Care - Treat your teammates and our community as you would want to be treated

Curiosity - Ask questions. Always state your assumptions

Tenacity - Persevere when times are tough

Discipline - Be consistent in your actions

Ambition - Aspire to become better every day

title: Executive Assistant (EA) to Founder - Women Only
description:
Executive Assistant - Job Description

Women-Only

Decalage Solutions

Remote

Part-Time with growth potential to Full-Time Contractor

Role Title: Executive Assistant (EA) to Founder

Reports To Founder



About Decalage Solutions

Decalage Solutions supports activists, advocates, feminists, and justice-centered leaders in preventing burnout, reclaiming their energy, rebuilding boundaries, and sustaining long-term purpose-driven impact.



Our work is grounded in:

-feminist principles

-anti-oppressive practice

-anti-colonialism

-trauma-aware communication

-sustainable work rhythms

-emotional integrity

-rest as resistance and a commitment to justice and liberation



We reject hustle culture, urgency culture, emotional labour extraction, and systems that expect women and gender-diverse people to over-function. We operate with depth, intention, consent, clarity, and care.



Role Purpose

The Executive Assistant (“EA”) serves as the right hand to the Founder and provides comprehensive support across the business and personal life of the Founder to help Decalage Solutions operate with clarity, consistency, and sustainable pacing.



The purpose of this role is to:

-protect the Founder’s time, energy, and cognitive bandwidth

-maintain organized systems and streamlined operations

-support administrative, operational, and logistical functions

-manage platforms, documentation, and digital workflows

-coordinate contractors, projects, and communications

-assist with personal tasks and life logistics

-uphold the values, boundaries, and emotional integrity of the organization



This role is essential to ensuring that the Founder can focus on high-impact work while the business operates smoothly behind the scenes.



Core Responsibilities



Executive Administrative Support:

-Manage inbox, scheduling, calendar, and communications

-Prepare agendas, meeting notes, project briefs, and follow-ups

-Maintain organizational systems to reduce cognitive load

-Track deadlines, tasks, priorities, and project timelines

-Draft aligned, professional
s and messages

-Anticipate needs to support decision-making and workflow pacing



Operations & Systems Management:

-Create, update, and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

-Manage organization across Google Drive, Asana, and internal systems

-Oversee setup and ongoing maintenance of Skool tiers (Free, Tier 2, Tier 3)

-Upload and maintain digital products on Stan Store

-Assist with workflow automation (Zapier/Buffer, Stripe/PayPal, scheduling systems)

-Maintain operational consistency, documentation, and version control

-Manage Squarespace and Acuity 



Finance & Business Administration

-Track revenue from all channels (Skool, Stan Store, retreats, digital products, coaching)

-Maintain financial tracking spreadsheets

-Prepare organized documentation for bookkeeping and tax filings

-Coordinate with accountants or financial professionals as needed

-Track subscriptions and recurring expenses



Marketing & Content Coordination:

-Upload content, lessons, audio files, and worksheets to Skool

-Maintain product listings and digital assets on Stan Store

-Support content organization for Brainz Magazine articles and other media

-Assist with retreat sales pages and offer suite updates

-Organize digital files, promotional materials, and publishing workflows



Retreat & Event Support:

-Assist with retreat applications, screening workflows, and communication

-Support logistical planning for retreats and events

-Prepare travel schedules, transportation plans, and accommodation details

-Assist with packing lists, vendor coordination, welcome gifts, and supplies

-Provide optional on-site support during retreats

-Help maintain emotional and logistical boundaries throughout the retreat process



Personal Support for the Founder

-Assist with personal scheduling, appointments, and coordination

-Support errands, shopping, deliveries, and household tasks

-Support personal travel planning and coordination

-Maintain strict confidentiality and discretion at all times



Values Alignment

-The EA must be deeply aligned with Decalage’s values, including:

-feminist leadership

-anti-oppressive and anti-racist practice

-trauma-aware communication

-LGBTQ+ inclusion

-Bodily autonomy, body-positive, pro-choice

-pro-liberation stances (Palestine, Congo, Sudan, Indigenous sovereignty, BLM)

-boundaries-first culture

-clear, compassionate communication

-sustainable pace and nervous-system-awareness

-discretion, confidentiality, and grounded presence



Alignment with these values is required for this role.



Qualifications 

Required:

-Prior experience as an EA, Operations Assistant, Project Coordinator, or similar

-Strong written and verbal communication skills

-High emotional intelligence and discretion

-Ability to balance business and personal tasks

-Proficiency with Google Workspace and scheduling tools

-Willingness to learn Skool, Stan Store, Zapier/Buffer, and Asana

-Organized, proactive, and anticipatory working style

-Ability to maintain boundaries and practice non-reactive communication



Preferred:

-Bilingual (English/Spanish)

-Experience in trauma-aware, feminist, or justice-centered environments

-Experience supporting entrepreneurs or service-based businesses

-Familiarity with Stripe/PayPal and digital product platforms



Work Style & Culture Fit

-You will thrive in this role if you:

-enjoy creating structure, ease, and organization

-anticipate needs and work independently

-communicate openly and compassionately

-appreciate sustainable pacing and nervous-system safety

-maintain clear boundaries and don’t absorb emotional labour

-show initiative and grounded leadership in your domain

-enjoy being a strategic support partner

-are detail-oriented without rigidity

-hold confidentiality and discretion as core integrity values



Hours & Compensation:

-Status: Independent Contractor

-Starting Hours: 20 hours per week

-Growth

-Hours may increase as business needs expand, with potential for full-time

-Position advancement opportunities also available

-Hourly Rate: $7 - $10 USD per hour, based on experience

-Payment: Monthly, for the prior month 

-Reviews:

     90-day review with potential rate increase

    Annual performance reviews thereafter

-Compensation is for hours worked only (no PTO or holiday pay)



To Apply

Provide:

-Resume

-Short introduction describing alignment with Decalage Solutions’ mission and values

-Example of organizational system you’ve created or managed (optional)

-Earliest start date and weekly availability

title: Elementor Conversion Page Designer (WordPress Service Websites)
description:
Experienced Elementor Funnel Designer Only — Beginners Do Not Apply



**IMPORTANT — READ FIRST**



This role is **not for beginners, VAs, or general WordPress assistants.**



Please **do not apply** if your experience is limited to:



• installing themes

• building basic pages from templates

• uploading blog posts

• using page builders without understanding layout hierarchy

• managing websites as a VA



Applications that **do not follow the instructions below will be ignored automatically.**



**ROLE OVERVIEW**



We are looking for a **WordPress / Elementor designer** who understands **conversion-focused page structure for service businesses.**



This role focuses on improving the **design, clarity, and conversion flow** of existing website pages.



The website already exists and is functional.

This role improves **user experience and layout effectiveness**, not backend development.



**CORE RESPONSIBILITIES**



Design and improve Elementor page layouts for service funnels.



Tasks include:



• restructuring page hierarchy

• improving section layout and readability

• optimizing call-to-action placement

• improving pricing presentation

• adding trust signals and credibility sections

• improving mobile layout and responsiveness

• simplifying user flow between pages



You will work on **existing pages**, not build a new site from scratch.



**INITIAL PROJECT**



The first task will be reviewing and improving a **Book Formatting service funnel**.



Pages involved:



• landing page

• service explanation sections

• pricing presentation

• order/payment page layout

• confirmation page



Goal:



Improve clarity, trust, and conversion flow while maintaining the existing payment system.



**REQUIRED EXPERIENCE**



Applicants must demonstrate experience with:



• WordPress

• Elementor

• responsive layout design

• service-based website funnels

• improving conversion flow on landing pages



Strong understanding of:



• section hierarchy

• CTA placement

• readability and visual structure

• mobile optimization



**NOT PART OF THIS ROLE**



This role does **not include**:



• CRM systems

• payment integrations

• automation platforms

• marketing campaigns

• SEO strategy work



This role focuses strictly on **page layout and user experience.**



**TECHNICAL SKILLS REQUIRED**



• WordPress

• Elementor

• CSS (basic to intermediate)

• mobile responsiveness

• layout troubleshooting



**REQUIRED PORTFOLIO**



Please provide **3 examples of WordPress or Elementor sites you have improved.**



Include:



1. URL

2. What you improved on the page

3. What the problem was before your change



Applications without examples will **not be reviewed.**



**REQUIRED SCREENING QUESTION**



At the top of your application, answer this question:



**What are the three most common layout mistakes you see on service business landing pages?**



Short answers only.



**APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS**



To confirm the instructions were read carefully, begin your message with this subject line:



**ELEMENTOR FUNNEL DESIGNER**



**HOURS AND RATE**



Part-time project work



Expected workload:



10–20 hours initially



More work may follow depending on performance.



Please include:



• hourly rate

• weekly availability



**FINAL NOTE**



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys **improving existing websites and making them easier for visitors to understand and act on.**



The work focuses on **clarity, structure, and user experience**, not marketing hype or unnecessary redesign.



Project length: 10–20 hours initially.



Additional work may follow if the first project is completed successfully and design is strong and aligned with our brand / site.

title: Inside Sales Agent (Real Estate) – Full Time – US Hours
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full Time – US Central Time (night shift PH time)

Industry: Residential Real Estate



About the Role



A growing real estate team based in Oklahoma, USA is hiring a full-time Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to help manage and convert inbound leads.



The primary responsibility will be calling leads generated from
 advertising, qualifying them, and setting appointments for the real estate agent.



This role is heavily focused on phone conversations and lead follow-up. You will spend most of your day speaking with people in the United States.



This is not a quiet virtual assistant role. The right person will be energetic, persistent, and confident on the phone.



If you enjoy speaking with people, building relationships, and helping convert opportunities into real business, this can be a very rewarding position.



If you dislike being on the phone or struggle with rejection, this role will likely not be a good fit.



The Inside Sales Agent will become a core part of the team’s lead conversion system and will work directly with the agent to improve scripts, follow-up, and results.



Key Responsibilities



• Call new
 leads quickly after they register

• Follow up with leads that have not yet responded

• Qualify potential buyers and sellers using a script

• Set appointments for the real estate agent

• Log every call, conversation, and follow-up in the CRM

• Keep the CRM clean, organized, and up to date

• Follow up with leads over time until they are ready

• Communicate with the agent about lead quality and trends

• Bring energy and professionalism to the team every day



You will typically make 100+ calls per day.



For people who enjoy conversations and problem solving, the day moves quickly.

For people who dislike rejection, the role will feel difficult.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



Please do not apply unless you meet these requirements.



• Clear spoken English that Americans can easily understand

• Cold calling, call center, or appointment setting experience

• Comfortable making a high volume of calls every day

• CRM experience (Lofty, Follow Up Boss, Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)

• High-speed internet and reliable computer

• Professional headset and quiet work environment

• Ability to work US Central Time hours



Skills That Will Help You Succeed



Strong candidates often have:



• Real estate lead conversion experience

• Strong phone presence and confidence

• Positive, energetic personality

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• High attention to detail in CRM management

• Ability to follow scripts and systems while sounding natural

• A mindset of continuous improvement



Who This Job Is For



This position is a great fit for someone who:



• Enjoys talking to people throughout the day

• Is motivated by setting appointments and creating opportunities

• Likes structured systems and clear expectations

• Takes pride in staying organized and disciplined

• Brings positivity and energy to their work

• Wants a stable, long-term position with a growing team



Who This Job Is NOT For



This position will not be a good fit if you:



• Dislike phone-based work

• Have difficulty being understood by Americans

• Prefer slower-paced or quiet workdays

• Struggle with organization and CRM updates

• Become discouraged after hearing “no”

• Are uncomfortable making 80–150 calls per day

title: Customer service VA Lifetime
description:
Job Vacancy: Customer Service Manager



About the Role:As the Customer Service Manager, you will be responsible for the customer service department of our e-commerce stores. Your main objective is to ensure that our customers have an excellent service experience by leveraging your management skills, guiding the team, and effectively handling inquiries, complaints, and disputes.



You have experience in managing Whop and Shopify disputes and know how to keep them as low as possible. We are looking for someone with proven experience in customer service within the dropshipping sector in the fashion niche, the supply chain and tracking orders through parcel panel and expertise in handling payment disputes.  The store operates within a single market, and the work is divided into two shifts: ( EST TIME ZONE)



Additionally, you will be responsible for meeting KPIs and preparing weekly data-driven reports. As our company grows, we seek tea
mbers who are eager to grow with us!



Responsibilities:



manage the customer service department and supply chain .

Ensure an outstanding customer experience and maintain a low dispute rate.

Monitor and achieve KPIs, reporting directly to the General Manager.

Optimize customer service processes and seek improvements.

Effectively handle Whop and Shopify disputes.

Collaborate and communicate with colleagues and other departments.

Provide feedback on the efficiency of customer service processes.

Ensure compliance with customer service guidelines, standards, and policies.



Results:



All customer inquiries are answered within 24 hours. responding time of 2 hours average.

Customer issues and questions are efficiently and professionally resolved.

KPI targets are consistently met.

Customers are highly satisfied with the provided service.

The customer service department operates independently and effectively without constant supervision.



Requirements:



experience with Giorgias.

Strong interpersonal skills and a genuine commitment to customer satisfaction.

Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

Experience in e-commerce and dropshipping is required.

Strong management and leadership skills.

Willingness to grow within the company.

Availability 7 days a week.



Competencies:



Attention to detail.

Strong leadership skills.

Excellent written and verbal communication.

Proactive and solution-oriented mindset.

Team player with strong adaptability skills.

Loyal and professional.



Technical Requirements:



Reliable and stable internet connection.

Access to a fully functional phone, laptop, or computer.

Sufficient storage space on your device.

Do you want to contribute to the success of our growing e-commerce business? Apply now and grow with us!

title: Marketing & Content Creator
description:
The Role:



This is a hybrid marketing + content creation role. You’ll manage our social media presence, plan and execute content strategy, AND create short-form video content (TikToks, Reels, Shorts) for our apps. You’re the full package — you can think strategically about what to post and when, but you can also open CapCut, record a voiceover, and make a video that actually performs. You’ll be working across multiple apps, so the work stays varied and interesting.



What You’ll Do



Content Creation (50%)

• Create 6–12 short-form videos per month across our app portfolio (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

• Produce gameplay clips, screen recordings with voiceover, app walkthroughs, and trending format content

• Stay on top of TikTok/Reels trends, sounds, and hooks in the gaming and app space

• Adapt your content style for different apps — a game needs different energy than a utility app

• Deliver raw and edited video files for repurposing across platforms



Marketing & Social Media Management (40%)

• Manage and grow Degen Game Studios’ social media accounts (TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube)

• Build and maintain a content calendar across all apps and platforms

• Schedule and publish content using tools like Buffer, Later, or similar

• Monitor and respond to community engagement — comments, DMs, app reviews

• Research trending hashtags, sounds, and content formats relevant to our apps

• Identify influencer and cross-promotion opportunities



Analytics & Growth (10%)

• Track key metrics: downloads, engagement rates, follower growth, video performance

• Assist with App Store Optimization (ASO) for both App Store and Google Play — keyword research, screenshot ideas, description updates

• Help set up and monitor basic paid ad campaigns when needed (Apple Search Ads, Meta Ads)

• Provide a brief monthly summary of what’s working and what to try next



Requirements

• 1–2+ years of experience in social media marketing, content creation, or both

• Strong portfolio of short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, or Shorts) — share your work

• Comfortable with voiceover and screen recording (face on camera optional, voice required)

• Proficient with video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or similar)

• Understanding of what performs on TikTok and Reels — hooks, pacing, trending formats

• Experience with social media scheduling and analytics tools

• Strong written communication and ability to work independently

• Genuine interest in mobile gaming, apps, or tech content



Nice to Have

• Experience marketing mobile apps or games on iOS and Android

• Existing audience in the mobile gaming or app review niche

• Familiarity with ASO for both App Store and Google Play

• Experience with Apple Search Ads or Meta Ads Manager

• Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, etc.)

• Experience managing multiple products or brands simultaneously



Why This Role

• Get in on the ground floor of a growing indie studio with multiple titles in the pipeline

• Creative freedom — you’ll shape the brand voice and content strategy from scratch

• Flexible, remote, part-time schedule that works around your life

• Opportunity to grow with the studio as we scale — more apps, bigger budgets, more responsibility

title: Senior Automation Developer (n8n, Python & Claude Code)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Developer and Automation Expert to join our team and lead the design, development, and implementation of advanced, AI-driven automation systems for our company.



This role is not just about connecting tools; it requires a true developer at heart. If you write clean code, have deep hands-on experience with n8n and Python, and are already leveraging modern AI coding tools like Claude Code to build faster and smarter, we want you on our team.



Responsibilities

Design & Build: Architect, build, and maintain complex, highly reliable automation workflows using n8n.



Custom Development: Write and maintain custom Python scripts to handle complex data manipulation, custom API integrations, and backend processes that go beyond standard n8n capabilities.



AI Integration: Leverage Claude Code to develop, debug, and optimize code, automation processes, and custom scripts.



System Integration: Connect third-party tools, SaaS platforms, databases, and CRMs via REST APIs, Webhooks, and OAuth.



Optimization & Maintenance: Implement robust error handling, logging, retries, and performance optimization for all code and workflows.



Business Alignment: Translate business requirements and operational bottlenecks into technical, scalable automation logic.



Requirements (Must-Haves)

Software Development Background: Proven experience as a developer with a strong understanding of software engineering principles and system architecture.



Python Mastery: Strong, hands-on experience writing clean, efficient, and production-ready Python code. (This is a strict requirement).



n8n Mastery: Extensive experience building, deploying, and maintaining n8n workflows in a production environment. (This is a strict requirement).



Claude Code Expertise: Proven, hands-on experience using Claude Code for development, scripting, and building AI-assisted automations. (This is a strict requirement).



Technical Foundation: Deep understanding of APIs (REST), Webhooks, JSON, data structures, and conditional routing.



Mindset: High ownership, responsibility, and strong analytical problem-solving skills.



Nice to Have

Proficiency in JavaScript / Node.js (highly preferred for custom n8n nodes).

title: Recruiter
description:
Our client is on a mission to redefine the way job seekers embark on their next career adventure. As a Reverse Recruiter, you will be at the heart of this transformation. This unique role is designed for someone who wants to make a significant impact on individuals' professional lives, by bridging the gap between talent and opportunity. You'll partner closely with job seekers, diving deep into their professional backgrounds, aspirations, and preferences to proactively identify and secure opportunities that resonate with their career goals. Your expertise will turn the traditional job search process on its head, creating a personalized, supportive journey for each candidate.





Key Responsibilities:

Foster strong relationships with job seekers, becoming their trusted advisor and advocate in the job market.

Leverage your understanding of the candidates’ skills and goals to identify and secure job opportunities that align with their aspirations.

Develop and maintain a dynamic pipeline of eligible job posts for your client.

Assess job postings to ensure they meet the clients criteria and potential for success.

Act as the primary point of contact for clients, offering guidance and answering questions throughout their job search journey.

Achieve daily targets relating to job postings and applications processed.



Qualifications:

A Bachelor's degree or higher is preferred, showcasing your commitment to learning and professional development.

Exceptional proficiency in English, with the ability to convey complex ideas.

Outstanding organizational skills, with a knack for juggling multiple priorities seamlessly.

Innate interpersonal abilities, with a genuine passion for connecting with and supporting others.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite, demonstrating your ability to navigate and utilize software to enhance productivity.

A track record of meeting and exceeding quotas, showing your dedication to achieving goals.

At least 2 years of experience in recruiting, indicating your understanding of the job market and talent acquisition strategies.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
About Us



Virtue Health has been transforming how mid-size employers self-fund through group purchasing for over 8 years, with our flagship Private Stop Loss Consortium helping them share risk, reduce volatility, and enhance benefits seamlessly. Our mission is to bring transparency and control to employers’ healthcare spending.







As Virtue Health continues to grow, we know our success depends on the talent we bring in.



That’s why we’re looking for the best, people like you, who act with integrity, reliability, responsibility, dedication, and a commitment to continuous improvement. Here, you’ll be immersed in a diverse, supportive environment where everyone is inspired to do their best work.







So, If you live by these values—Be Virtuous, Accountable, Do Whatever It Takes, Be consistent, have a growth mindset—you’ll thrive here.





Role Overview



The SDR plays in managing and overseeing the lead conversion process. You will act as a bridge between the marketing and sales teams, qualifying and converting leads to support our growth objectives







Key Responsibilities



Include but not limited too



Handle both outbound and inbound customer calls.

Set appointments between brokerages and our sales team.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date client profiles in the CRM system.

Demonstrate high-quality customer service by addressing brokerage needs and concerns.

Meet or exceed individual lead conversion and appointment-setting targets.

Develop an in-depth understanding of the US insurance industry to engage in meaningful conversations with potential clients.



Key Skills and Qualifications



At least 2 years of experience in a similar SDR role.

Proven success in client engagement and lead conversion.

Experience with CRM systems, preferably Hubspot

Strong communication skills in English (C1 level minimum).

A proactive approach with the ability to adapt to rapid changes and ambiguity.

Goal-oriented with a focus on driving results.

A customer-centric mindset with the ability to identify and address client needs.

Collaborative and a team player, capable of working with both marketing and sales teams.



Who This Role Is For



This role is for those who:



Thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and embrace change with agility.

Excel in rapidly growing settings, navigating ambiguity with confidence and adaptability.

Are driven by excellence, always seeking to improve and raise the bar.

Operate with unwavering integrity, honesty, and strong ethical values.

Demonstrate consistency, follow-through, and a commitment to high standards.

Take full ownership of their responsibilities, hold themselves accountable, and seek solutions rather than excuses.

Go above and beyond, consistently putting in the effort to deliver exceptional results.

Embrace feedback, personal growth, and continuous learning as essential to their success.



Salary and Compensation



Our compensation structure is designed to reflect that increased responsibility, results, and leadership drive higher pay within our organization.



Virtue Health Recruitment Process



Pre-Screening Assessment

Cultural Interview

Skill Assessment

Skills Interview

Final Interview



Apply now to join our team and be part of a journey that makes a difference.

title: END-TO-END ACCOUNTANT/BOOKKEEPER
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training, generous Christmas bonus

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

title: Sales Representative – Credit Repair
description:
Sales Representative – Credit Repair (Inbound Closing Role)

IMPORTANT: Read Before Applying



This is NOT a virtual assistant position and NOT a basic appointment-setting role.

We are looking for an experienced credit repair sales professional who can run full sales calls, analyze credit reports live, and close clients.



If your background is limited to dispute processing, CRM management, or administrative support without sales experience, this role is not a fit.



Role Overview



Your primary responsibility is to convert inbound leads into paying clients.

You will:

-Take inbound calls and scheduled virtual appointments

-Conduct full credit consultations

-Close qualified prospects on our credit repair programs

-Hand off closed clients to our onboarding team



This role requires confidence, sales ability, and deep understanding of credit repair.





What You Will Be Doing on Sales Calls



During live calls, you will be expected to:

-Review a prospect’s credit report line by line

-Identify and explain derogatory items such as:

-Collections

-Charge-offs

-Late payments

-Inquiries

-Public records (if applicable)



Clearly explain:

-What can and cannot be disputed

-How the credit repair process works step-by-step

-Realistic timelines and expectations

-Answer detailed, technical credit-related questions confidently

-Close the client on the appropriate service package





Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



You must have:

-Prior experience selling credit repair services

OR

-Hands-on experience reviewing credit reports combined with sales/closing experience



-Strong understanding of:

  -Credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

  -Dispute processes and timelines

  -Compliance basics (FCRA, CROA – high-level understanding is sufficient)

  -Proven ability to close deals, not just book appointments



Who This Role Is NOT For



? Virtual assistants who only handle disputes

? CRM managers without sales experience

? Script readers or appointment setters

? Anyone uncomfortable reviewing credit reports live on calls



Ideal Candidate Traits



? Confident communicator

? Sales-driven and goal-oriented

? Comfortable discussing sensitive financial situations

? Professional, consultative, and trustworthy on calls

? Able to educate and close without pressure tactics



Compensation

-Base pay + performance-based commissions

-Long-term opportunity with a growing credit repair company

-Consistent inbound lead flow (no cold calling)



Application Instructions (Important)



To apply, please include:

-Your specific experience in credit repair sales

-How many credit repair clients you have personally closed

-Tools or CRMs you have used (if applicable)

-A short voice or video introduction (preferred)



Applications without sales-related credit experience will not be considered.

title: Credit Repair Sales
description:
Summary

Your role will be to convert inbound leads into booked virtual appointments, sit those appointments, and close clients before handing them off to our onboarding team. This is not a simple appointment-setting or script-reading position. While you will not personally send dispute letters, you must fully understand the credit repair process. During sales calls, you will be expected to:



-Review a prospect’s credit report line by line



-Explain derogatory items clearly (collections, charge-offs, late payments, inquiries, etc.)



-Educate prospects on what can and cannot be disputed



-Explain how our credit repair process works, step by step



-Set realistic expectations and timelines



-Confidently answer detailed credit-related questions



Because of this, prior hands-on experience in credit repair or credit repair sales is required. You must already understand the full dispute process, reporting agencies, and compliance basics.

title: Production Artist - Adobe Illustrator 2026
description:
Looking to higher 1-to-2 production artists for a USA based company. I'll be able to teach you the process, file naming conventions, and everything you'll need to be successful. The tasks are repetitive and not overly creative. Needing skilled designers with 3+ years of Adobe Illustrator experience and access to the always most recent version of the program via an Adobe Illustrator creative cloud subscription. Company will cover cost of the subscription. Looking for designers who want to partner for years to come.



1) We'll need an NDA signed and none of our work will be able to be shared in your portfolio. Are you willing to sign an NDA and keep all files confidential?

2) Do you work on EST (East Coast USA time)? Do you work Monday - Friday? What is your ideal setup?

3) Are you familiar with WhatsApp for communication?

4) Are you trained and skilled in Adobe Illustrator? Do you have Creative Cloud and do you always update to the newest Adobe Illustrator version?

5) Are you familiar with Google Drive and both downloading & uploading files?

6) Are you good with asking questions if something doesn't make sense? Do you like to problem solve if needed?

7) Are you skilled with Photoshop?

8) How do you feel about working on a lot of files each day, sometimes with "urgent" rushes needing to jump to the top of your "to do list" and forcing you to put on pause a project you were already working on?

9) What are you wanting out of a job and what type of manager? How could I best support you as your manager?

10) What are 3 personality traits you admire about yourself and that you feel make you a great employee?
