title: Social Media & Partnerships Specialist
description:
Social Media & Partnerships Specialist

(Fluent Written English Required)



ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a highly competent, detail-oriented communicator to support our Social Media & Partnerships programs.



This role involves communicating directly with creators, managing ongoing conversations, and executing outreach and partnership tasks across various platforms.



The role is writing-heavy and execution-focused. You’ll be expected to communicate clearly, track conversations accurately, and complete tasks with minimal supervision.



Prior influencer or social media experience is helpful but not required. What matters most is excellent written English, strong comprehension, attention to detail, and the ability to learn quickly.



This is a fast-moving environment, so you should be comfortable figuring things out and navigating new platforms independently when needed.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

• Communicating with creators across various platforms using brand-aligned messaging

• Writing clear, warm, and professional messages in natural, fluent English

• Managing multiple conversations while maintaining context and accuracy

• Tracking creator conversations and updates precisely in internal trackers

• Executing outreach and partnership tasks based on general guidelines

• Navigating new platforms and tools independently when necessary

• Figuring out how to complete tasks even when step-by-step instructions are not provided

• Asking thoughtful clarifying questions when needed



Some processes have guidelines, but not every task has a detailed SOP.



This role requires curiosity and initiative. You should be comfortable exploring platforms and figuring things out when instructions are limited.



THIS ROLE IS A GREAT FIT IF YOU

• Write fluent, polished English (grammar, tone, and clarity matter)

• Understand instructions quickly and execute tasks correctly

• Are naturally detail-oriented and double-check your work

• Can work independently without constant supervision

• Enjoys learning new tools and platforms 

• Are comfortable communicating with creators and external partners

• Stay organized while managing multiple conversations

• Take ownership of tasks and move things forward without waiting for constant instructions



THIS ROLE MAY NOT BE A FIT IF YOU

• Prefer step-by-step instructions for every task

• Struggle to learn new platforms/tools independently

• Rely heavily on templates without understanding context

• Have difficulty writing in natural, fluent English

• Need repeated reminders to follow instructions

• Rush through work without reviewing accuracy



(We share this clearly to respect everyone’s time.)



REQUIREMENTS

• Fluent written English — Non-negotiable

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy — Non-negotiable

• Prior social media experience — Preferred but not required

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



HOW TO APPLY

Please send us a short video introduction (maximum 2 minutes) explaining:

• Who you are

• Why you believe this role is a good fit for you



This doesn’t need to be professional or polished. A quick phone video is totally fine.



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a short task assessment (maximum of 3 tasks).



To confirm you’ve read the full job description, please include the word “initiative” in the first line of your written introduction.



If this sounds like a role where you’d thrive, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Senior WordPress Developer
description:
Senior WordPress Developer



Full Website Rebuild | Project-Based | Remote



We are a well-established, woman-owned luxury holiday and architectural lighting design company based in Chicago, serving residential and commercial clients for more than 22 years.



We are preparing to rebuild our entire website and are seeking a highly skilled Senior WordPress Developer who can execute from structured wireframes while bringing refined design sensibility and deep technical expertise.



This is not a simple update role. This is a full rebuild. We are providing clear wireframes and framework direction, but the developer must understand how to translate structure into a dynamic, elegant, high-performing WordPress site.



The Project



* Full WordPress website rebuild

* Execution based on provided wireframes and framework

* Maintain defined look and feel aligned with a premium brand

* Build a dynamic, visually beautiful, responsive site

* Structure the site for both AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and SEO (Search Engine Optimization)

* Ensure speed, mobile responsiveness, and technical performance



What We Need



* Deep expertise in WordPress architecture, themes, and custom development

* Strong understanding of AEO and SEO structure, schema, metadata, and page hierarchy

* Ability to follow wireframes precisely while elevating the design execution

* Strong eye for layout, spacing, typography, and visual balance

* Experience building elegant, high-end, conversion-focused websites

* Ability to create a dynamic site that is easy for our internal team to manage post-launch



We are essentially giving you the playbook. We need someone who can execute it beautifully and technically correctly.



Ideal Candidate



* Highly detail-oriented

* Understands nuance within WordPress, not just surface-level editing

* Can balance structure with aesthetic refinement

* Communicates clearly and professionally

* Comfortable working independently with defined deliverables



Compensation Structure

title: Web Designer & CRO Specialist
description:
SaaSLaunch helps SaaS founders scale through predictable client acquisition systems, high-performing campaigns, and stronger operational infrastructure.



We are looking for a Web Designer & CRO Specialist who can design, optimize, and manage high-converting landing pages for our clients’ funnels. Your work will directly impact how effectively traffic from paid ads, cold
, and organic channels turns into booked meetings, demos, and sales.



This is a high-impact role for someone who understands conversion psychology, funnel design, user experience, and performance marketing — not just how to make pages look good, but how to make them convert.



About the Role



As our Web Designer & CRO Specialist, you will own the landing page experience across multiple SaaSLaunch client funnels.



You’ll work closely with our Media Buyers, Copywriters, and Client Success team to build, improve, and scale landing pages that turn traffic into qualified leads. This role blends strong design skills with a deep focus on performance, testing, and optimization.



Responsibilities



- Design and build high-converting landing pages using modern no-code tools such as Framer, Webflow, ClickFunnels, or GoHighLevel

- Audit existing funnels to identify UX issues, drop-off points, and conversion leaks

- Run and implement CRO tests on headlines, CTAs, layouts, forms, offers, and social proof

- Collaborate with copywriting and paid media teams to ensure strong message-to-market alignment

- Track and report on funnel performance metrics such as CTR, CVR, CPL, bounce rate, and time on page

- Develop reusable page templates and frameworks that can scale across clients

- Optimize pages for mobile responsiveness, load speed, and clarity

- Stay current with best practices in conversion optimization and funnel design



Qualifications:

You’re a strong fit if you:



- Have 2+ years of experience in web design, landing page development, or CRO

- Have worked in an agency, marketing, or SaaS environment

- Have built or optimized landing pages that directly improved conversions, ad performance, or sales

- Are skilled in Webflow, Framer, ClickFunnels, or GoHighLevel

- Understand key conversion principles such as clarity, urgency, trust, friction reduction, and social proof

- Know how to balance design and performance

- Enjoy analyzing data and running experiments to improve results

- Thrive in a fast-paced, feedback-driven, performance-focused environment



Success Metrics

Success in this role will be measured by:



- Conversion Rate: Landing pages consistently hit or exceed target CVR benchmarks

- Cost per Lead: Optimizations help reduce CPL across paid and outbound traffic sources

- Speed: New page builds and updates are delivered within 48–72 hours

- Client ROI: Funnel improvements contribute directly to stronger campaign performance and retention



Compensation

OTE: $2,000–$5,000 USD/month

Base Pay: $1,000–$2,000

Performance Bonuses: $500–$3,000 based on conversion improvements, ROI, and throughput



How to Apply:

Apply here: 



Please include the following in your application:

- A 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself and sharing your experience with web design and conversion optimization

- Portfolio links to landing pages or funnels you’ve designed or optimized

- A short note on your favorite CRO principle and how you’ve applied it in a real project



We’re looking for someone who cares deeply about performance, moves fast, and knows how to turn traffic into results.

title: Media Buyer (Meta Ads) for SaaS Clients
description:
About SaaSLaunch



SaaSLaunch helps SaaS founders scale by building predictable client acquisition systems, launching high-performing campaigns, and strengthening their operational infrastructure.



We are looking for a Media Buyer to plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns for SaaS companies — from early-stage founders to established SaaS businesses. Your role will be to manage campaign performance, help clients hit their growth milestones, and ensure ad spend drives measurable ROI.



Your Role



As a Media Buyer, you will manage paid acquisition campaigns primarily on Meta 
 & Instagram) while collaborating with our Client Success team to align ad strategy with each client’s growth goals.



This role requires strong analytical thinking, hands-on campaign management, and continuous creative testing. You won’t just run ads — you’ll help optimize the entire SaaS acquisition funnel.



Responsibilities



• Plan, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns for SaaS clients (Meta Ads required)

• Build campaign structures, targeting strategies, and budgets aligned with client ICPs

• Continuously test creatives, copy, and audiences to improve performance

• Monitor KPIs including CPL, CAC, CTR, CPM, ROAS, and demo bookings

• Collaborate with Client Success Managers to ensure campaigns support client acquisition goals

• Identify funnel bottlenecks (traffic ? lead ? demo ? close) and recommend improvements

• Stay updated on advertising platform changes and SaaS growth strategies

• Communicate campaign performance and insights clearly



Requirements



You are a great fit if you:



• Have 2+ years experience managing paid campaigns (Meta Ads required)

• Have experience with B2B SaaS or high-ticket offers

• Have strong English communication skills

• Are analytical and comfortable working with campaign data

• Are proactive and constantly testing new ideas

• Understand SaaS funnels (demo bookings, sales calls, retention)

• Can manage multiple ad accounts and budgets simultaneously



Bonus if you have experience with:



• LinkedIn Ads

• Google Ads

• SaaS product launches

• Funnel optimization



Success Metrics



• Campaign ROI within 30–40 days of launch

• Consistent qualified demo bookings at target CPL

• Optimization cycles within 48–72 hours when performance drops

• Strong client satisfaction and retention

• Ability to scale profitable campaigns



Salary

(Top performers can reach $7,000+ OTE)

title: Medical Receptionist Virtual Assistant (Telehealth Experience)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced Medical Receptionist Virtual Assistant with Telehealth experience to support our US-based healthcare clients.



In this role, you will be responsible for managing patient communication, scheduling appointments, coordinating telehealth visits, and ensuring a smooth patient experience.



The ideal candidate is organized, professional, and comfortable working with patients and healthcare providers in a virtual environment.



Responsibilities



• Answer inbound patient calls and
s

• Schedule and manage patient appointments

• Coordinate telehealth visits and send meeting links to patients

• Verify patient information and update records

• Assist patients with telehealth platform access

• Confirm appointments and send reminders

• Document patient interactions in EMR systems

• Provide excellent patient support and customer service



Requirements



• At least 6 mos experience as a Medical Receptionist or Healthcare VA

• Experience working with Telehealth platforms

• Familiarity with EMR/EHR systems

• Excellent English communication skills

• Strong organizational and multitasking abilities

• Ability to handle sensitive patient information professionally

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Preferred Experience

• Experience with AthenaHealth, eClinicalWorks, Kareo, or AdvancedMD

• Experience with insurance verification or patient intake

• Experience supporting US healthcare clinics



Compensation

Competitive hourly rate based on experience



Additional benefits may include:

• Long-term position

• Performance bonuses

• Growth opportunities



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit:

1. Your updated resume

2. A 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself and your medical receptionist experience

3. Answer the following questions:



How many years of medical receptionist experience do you have?

What EMR/EHR systems have you used?

Which telehealth platforms have you worked with?

Rate your phone communication skills from 1–10.

Describe how you assist a patient who is having trouble joining a telehealth appointment.



Important:

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



We are looking for reliable, professional tea
mbers for long-term work.

title: Video Editor (Meta Ads, Organic, VSLs)
description:
About ShoulderRx

ShoulderRx helps active adults and CrossFit-style athletes fix shoulder pain and get back to training hard through online coaching. We grow with video: Meta ads, Reels, YouTube, and VSLs. We are looking for a video editor first and only. No DM work. Your job is to turn raw talking-head footage into ad creatives and content that get people to click and book calls.



Role Overview

Part-time to start, with the opportunity to move into a full-time role if we work well together.



You will edit:

- Paid ads for Meta 
/Instagram)

- Organic content (Reels, short-form clips)

- VSLs / longer-form videos (basic clean-up and cutdowns)



What You’ll Do

1. Ad & Short-Form Editing (Main Priority)

- Edit 10–20 short-form vertical videos per week (Meta ads + Reels)

- Add subtitles, zooms, jump cuts, emojis, and pattern interrupts to keep attention

- Create multiple variations from the same footage (different hooks, openings, CTAs)

- Organize all projects clearly in Google Drive



2. Organic Content & VSLs

- Turn longer recordings into short clips for social media

- Clean up and structure VSLs (remove dead air, add simple text where needed)

- Export in the correct formats for YouTube / socials



Compensation & Growth

- Option to grow into a full-time role if we’re a good fit

- Performance bonuses for creatives that become strong performers in our ad account

- We’ll discuss exact numbers and structure after the test project.



Must-Have Skills

- Proven experience editing short-form vertical videos (Reels/TikToks/shorts)

- Strong sense of pacing and attention retention (especially first 3–5 seconds)

- Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

- Clean file organization and naming habits

- Stable internet and a backup plan for outages

- Responsive communication and openness to feedback



Nice-to-Have

- Interest in fitness, CrossFit, or strength training

- Experience editing content for coaches / online programs



How to Apply

- Use subject line: “Video Editor – ShoulderRx – [Your Name]:

- Links to 3–5 of your BEST short-form edits (Reels/TikToks/ads – talking-head style preferred)

- A short Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself

- Your available working hours in PH time and CT time

- Whether you’re looking for part-time only or open to full-time later

title: Automation Specialist - Digital Marketing Agency (Singapore)
description:
We’re a Singapore-based digital marketing agency looking for an Automation Specialist to design and maintain our internal automation systems.

Key Responsibilities



- Build and maintain internal automation workflows.

- Integrate tools and platforms using APIs, webhooks, and automation engines.

- Develop reliable systems that handle errors and edge cases gracefully.

- Optimize automations to reduce operational overhead and task usage.

- Support internal reporting, content workflows, and marketing systems.



Qualifications



- Strong experience with n8n or similar automation platforms.

- Experience working with Airtable or similar flexible databases.

- Comfortable working with REST APIs, webhooks, and authentication methods.

- Familiarity with automation tools such as Make or Zapier.

- Bonus: scripting experience (Python, JavaScript, or PHP).

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to build simple, reliable systems.



How to Apply:



 
 with:



- Your updated CV/resume

- A cover letter explaining why you’re the best fit

- Use
 subject: “Systems in Motion”

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Reports to: CEO of HR Partners

About the Role:

We are seeking a highly reliable, proactive Virtual Executive Assistant to support our CEO, a dynamic and busy executive in the HR space. This role requires excellent organizational, communication, and technology skills, as well as the discretion and agility to handle both business and personal tasks.

etings; etc.

etings and take notes or follow-ups

To Apply:

Submit your resume and a brief cover letter or Loom video explaining:

Your experience in supporting executives

Tools you’re proficient with (especially from the list above)

Why you’re a great fit for Sheila, our CEO

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
We are an education and marketing company that works with coaches, speakers, and entrepreneurs who use speaking, content, and online programs to grow their businesses. Our work focuses on helping experts communicate clearly, build authority, and turn their expertise into revenue through digital platforms.



We are seeking a highly skilled Social Media Specialist who understands how social media platforms actually function beyond simply posting content. This role requires someone who understands audience behavior, platform algorithms, engagement strategy, and content positioning. The right person will know how to translate ideas into content that grows visibility, strengthens brand authority, and encourages meaningful engagement.



This is not a basic posting role. We are not looking for someone who simply schedules posts or relies only on Canva templates. We are looking for someone who understands the strategy behind social media growth and can execute content that supports business objectives.





Key Responsibilities



Manage day to day social media activity across platforms such as Instagram, LinkedIn, and other relevant channels.



Plan and execute content that aligns with brand positioning and marketing goals.



Analyze platform performance and recommend adjustments to improve reach, engagement, and audience growth.



Work closely with leadership to translate key messages, ideas, and educational content into compelling social media posts.



Create visually strong content using appropriate design tools and principles that align with the brand’s identity.



Monitor comments, messages, and community engagement to maintain a professional and responsive presence.



Stay informed on platform updates, trends, and best practices that impact organic reach and audience engagement.



Required Skills and Experience



Demonstrated experience managing social media accounts for a business, brand, coach, or entrepreneur.



Strong understanding of how platforms such as Instagram and LinkedIn function including content distribution, engagement signals, and audience behavior.



Ability to design visually appealing content using design tools beyond basic template editing. Knowledge of design principles such as layout, typography, and visual hierarchy is required.



Strong written and verbal English communication skills. The ability to write clearly and represent a brand professionally is essential.



Ability to work independently, manage deadlines, and communicate progress consistently.





This Role Is Not Suitable For



Individuals who only schedule or repost content without understanding strategy.



Applicants who rely exclusively on Canva templates without actual design knowledge.



Individuals who do not have experience managing brand accounts or understanding how social media supports business growth.





Application Requirements



To be considered, please include the following with your application:



A short introduction explaining your experience managing social media for brands or businesses.



Links to at least two social media accounts you have managed.



Examples of graphics or posts you designed yourself.



Applications without examples of past work will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who takes pride in their craft, understands the impact of strategic communication, and wants to contribute to a growing education company serving entrepreneurs and experts around the world.

title: Sales Development VA
description:
About Elemental

Elemental is a US-based premium drinkware brand based in CA, USA, serving B2B and promotional customers. We work with distributors, corporate buyers, and partners to deliver high-quality, custom drinkware solutions. We are building a lean, execution-driven sales team and are looking for a Sales Development VA who can actively manage and close live deals, manage follow-ups, and prospect leads while maintaining a great relationship with buyers and maximizing their potential. 



Role Overview

In this position, you will work closely with US-based Account Managers to support deal execution, prospecting, sales follow-ups to close projects, and develop new strategies to find leads for the sales pipeline. You are expected to think, validate, and communicate proactively, implement a strategy to efficiently close sales, build relationships with customers, and maximize their partnership with Elemental. If you prefer purely admin work or need constant direction, this role will not be a good fit.



Core Responsibilities:

- Manage sales territory under the supervision of an account manager in the US.

- Assist in sales strategy execution (pricing tiers, promos, bundles) to expand sales.

- Contribute to team sales targets and activity-based KPIs (outreach, follow-ups, meetings booked)

- Prepare and validate sales decks, pricing sheets, proposals, and catalogs

- Track deals, orders, and basic pipeline updates

- Send follow-up
s and support live deals with an “always be closing” mindset

- Prospect via
, LinkedIn, and occasional cold calls

- Find, qualify  leads, and book meetings for Account Managers

- Follow up quickly on inbound leads and re-engage cold or stalled prospects

- Handle sales-related phone calls (inbound and follow-ups)

- Provide daily and weekly sales activity and progress reports

- Confirm data accuracy before submission

- Help maintain great relationships with customers



Qualifications:

- Strong verbal and written English communication skills

- At least 1 to 2 years of experience in sales support, SDR, or sales coordination roles

- Comfortable with follow-ups, prospecting, and sales-related calls

- Strong attention to detail (pricing and data accuracy matter)

- Experience working with CRM

- Can work independently without constant reminders

- Proactively asks smart questions and proposes solutions

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive. You don’t wait to be told what to do.

- Understands urgency, ownership, and accountability in sales work

- Comfortable speaking up during meetings and contributing feedback

- Fully committed during working hours (no other clients during shift)



Nice to Have:

- Experience in B2B sales or promotional products

- Familiarity with pricing tiers, discounts, and bundles

- Experience supporting a US-based sales team

- Competitive, goal-driven mindset



Schedule & Compensation

- Schedule: Full-time, Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM PST

- Rate: $6/hour (8 hours/day with 1-hour unpaid break)

- Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses tied to sales contribution and results



How to Apply

-
 
 with the subject line: CoffeeThread

Include:

- Your resume/CV (PDF via Google Drive link)

- Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

- A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) explaining:

- Your experience in sales support or SDR work (How do you help move deals forward, why this role fits your strengths)



Final note

We value ownership, proactive communication, and execution. Silence, delays, or waiting to be told what to do do not work in this role.

title: AI Engineer to Build Automated Creative Generation System (Images and Video Ads)
description:
Please watch this video to understand the type of system we want to build:









We are looking for an experienced AI engineer to build a system that automatically generates marketing creatives such as images and short video ads from simple user input.



The goal is to create a pipeline where a user provides a short text or voice briefing and the system automatically plans and generates multiple marketing assets including product visuals, short video clips and UGC style advertisements.



The system we want to replicate is similar to the one demonstrated in the following video:



YouTube Reference

PASTE YOUR YOUTUBE VIDEO LINK HERE



Please watch the video before applying so you fully understand the type of system we want to build.



The goal is to create a similar automated workflow where AI plans and generates the creatives.



Core Idea of the System



The user provides a short input describing a product or marketing concept.



The AI system automatically:



• plans scenes and creative structure

• generates images

• generates short video sequences

• generates UGC style ads

• creates multiple variations for testing



The output should be ready to use for social media advertising such as TikTok, Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts.



Scope of Work



You will build an automated creative generation pipeline that includes the following components.



Input Layer



User can provide:



• text prompt

• optional voice input



The system interprets the briefing and extracts the main creative idea.



AI Planning Layer



Use a language model such as OpenAI or Claude to:



• interpret the user input

• generate a creative concept

• define scenes and shot types

• write ad scripts

• generate prompts for image and video generation



Image Generation



Automatically generate product visuals and marketing images.



Requirements



• generate multiple image variations

• support hero shots

• support product style marketing visuals



Possible tools



• Stable Diffusion

• Midjourney API

• DALL-E

• other generative image models



Video Generation



Generate short marketing videos including:



• hero shots

• zoom effects

• cinematic movement

• multi shot sequences



The system should combine generated clips into a final video output.



Possible tools



• Runway

• Pika

• Sora

• other AI video generation tools



UGC Style Ad Generation



Generate UGC style advertisements that simulate influencer videos.



Example



• person talking about the product

• short authentic looking social media ad

• generated script and voice



Possible implementation



• AI avatars

• voice synthesis

• template based UGC generation



Variation System



Each creative should be generated multiple times to produce variations for A B testing.



Output



The system should output:



• multiple images

• short marketing videos

• UGC style ads

• different creative variations



Optional but preferred



Automatically export formats optimized for:



• TikTok

• Instagram Reels

• YouTube Shorts



Preferred Tech Stack



OpenAI or Claude for planning layer

Python or Node.js backend

Stable Diffusion or similar image models

Runway Pika or Sora for video generation

FFmpeg for video composition



Optional experience



• LangChain

• AI agents

• n8n automation

• prompt pipelines



What We Are Looking For



Someone who:



• has experience building AI automation systems

• understands generative AI workflows

• can combine multiple AI tools into one pipeline

• has experience with image and video generation models



Deliverables



• working prototype of the system

• automated creative generation pipeline

• ability to generate multiple marketing creatives from a single input



Budget



Open for discussion depending on experience and proposed solution.



To Apply



Please include:



• examples of AI systems you built

• experience with generative AI tools

• your suggested architecture for building this system

title: Project Manager
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Project Manager who brings more than just credentials to the table — someone who genuinely cares about the work, the team, and the outcome. If your default response to a challenge is "How can I help?", you might be exactly who we need.

This role sits at the heart of our operations. You will own project timelines, coordinate cross-functional teams, and ensure that every initiative — big or small — moves forward with clarity and purpose.



We are deliberate about culture. The right candidate will stand out in three key areas:



1. Outstanding Communication — You keep Account Managers informed, surface blockers early, and make sure nobody is left guessing. Written and verbal clarity is non-negotiable.

2. Reliability — Deadlines are commitments. You follow through, you own your deliverables, and your team can count on you without having to check up.

3. "How Can I Help?" Attitude — You step in where needed, remove obstacles for your team, and lead by example. You are a multiplier, not a bottleneck.



Apply through this link:

title: Full-time Graphic Designer (Project-based)
description:
Company Overview

Amazon Growth Lab (AGL) is a results-driven agency dedicated to helping brands scale and succeed on Amazon. We specialize in optimizing product listings, driving targeted traffic, and boosting conversions through proven strategies. Our team of experts works closely with clients to maximize sales, improve rankings, and unlock growth opportunities in the ever-evolving Amazon marketplace.



Key Responsibilities

- Design Product Detail Pages (PDPs) with a strong focus on layout and composition.

- Dedicated solely to one brand, providing consistent focus and support

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand project requirements and deliver assets quickly and efficiently.

- Ensure designs are visually polished, functional, and optimized for e-commerce platforms.

- Handle image generation, retouching, and precise placement of copy with high attention to detail.

- Make revisions based on feedback while adhering to timelines and maintaining quality standards.

- Maintain consistency across all design outputs, ensuring professional formatting and alignment with brand guidelines.



Skills & Qualifications

- Proven experience in designing for e-commerce, particularly in product detail page layout.

- Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma.

- Strong layout and execution skills; conceptual creativity is not a major requirement.

- Ability to work fast and efficiently while maintaining accuracy.

- Excellent attention to detail and consistency in design outputs.

- Demonstrates strong communication skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams

- Must be available full-time and work exclusively with AGL for at least 2 months.



Company Policy:

- Schedule: Mon-Fri, 6 AM to 2 PM Pacific Time 

- Workday: An 8-hour workday is required.

- All Full-Time Contractors are to work exclusively with AGL. Working with other agencies while with AGL is strictly prohibited.

- Time Tracking: We use Time Doctor to track hours and activity.



Please carefully read the detailed job description and apply through this link:





Please note: Applications sent using the link above will be highly prioritized.

title: Remote Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a motivated and results-driven Lead Generation Specialist to help grow our sales pipeline and expand our customer base. As a BDR, you’ll be on the front lines of our sales efforts, identifying potential clients, generating leads, and nurturing opportunities to connect them with our solutions.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Proactively research and identify potential customers in target markets.

2. Reach out to prospects via
s, LinkedIn, and other communication channels.

3. Qualify leads to assess fit and interest, ensuring alignment with our services.

4. Schedule meetings or product demos between qualified leads and Sales Development Representatives.

5. Maintain accurate records of lead interactions and update CRM systems accordingly.

6. Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to execute campaigns and optimize lead generation strategies.

7. Stay up-to-date on industry trends and our product/service offerings to effectively communicate value propositions.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

- 2 - 3 years of experience in sales, business development, or a similar role (entry-level candidates with strong communication skills and a hunger to learn are also encouraged to apply).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build rapport quickly.

- Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and eager to exceed targets.

- Proficiency in extracting data from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other professional networks

- Must have a well-optimized LinkedIn account with atleast a minimum of 300 connections that can be used for prospecting

- Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, PipeDrive) is a plus.

- Comfortable with cold outreach and prospecting.



Who we are:

Acadium started with the belief that anyone, anywhere, should be able to get the skills and experience they need to start their career without barriers like price, schedule, or location getting in their way. Acadium gives anyone the tools, support, and mentorship they need to launch their dream career. Acadium is the only platform that provides real work experience, accessible to everyone. Acadium began in 2017 with a team of 3 co-founders: Richard Shaw, Marco Tundo, and Moe Abbas. Since then, they’ve attracted more than 120,000 student members and over 50,000 businesses to connect through the apprenticeship marketplace. Our team is growing and looking for people who are motivated, intelligent, and committed to making education accessible to join our team.



What we value:

Integrity - Be trustworthy in your actions

Care - Treat your teammates and our community as you would want to be treated

Curiosity - Ask questions. Always state your assumptions

Tenacity - Persevere when times are tough

Discipline - Be consistent in your actions

Ambition - Aspire to become better every day

Service -Serve your community to the best of your abilities.



Interested applicants may send updated CVs and LinkedIn URLs with a minimum of 300 connections to 

 Subject: [Adjective that describes you] B2B Lead Generation Specialist

**Note: Only applicants who submit their resumes and LinkedIn URL will be evaluated.

title: Cold Caller / Lead Lister
description:
Apply Directly to the Link: 



We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Cold Caller / Lead Lister to support our outreach and lead generation efforts. This role focuses on identifying potential prospects, building accurate lead lists, and initiating outbound calls to introduce services, qualify prospects, and schedule follow-ups for the sales team. The ideal candidate is confident on the phone, organized with data, and comfortable handling high-volume outreach.

Introduce services and identify potential client interest

Record call outcomes, notes, and follow-up actions accurately

Maintain daily call and lead generation targets

Continuously update and clean lead databases for accuracy



Qualifications:

Previous experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or lead generation preferred

Strong verbal communication and persuasion skills

Comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls daily

Good research and data entry skills

Familiarity with CRM systems, Google Sheets, or similar tools

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Ability to handle rejection and remain professional



Preferred Skills:

Experience in B2B outreach

Basic sales or appointment-setting experience

Ability to work independently and meet daily outreach goals

title: Non-voice B2B Business Development Representative
description:
We’re looking for a motivated and results-driven Business Development Representative to help grow our sales pipeline and expand our customer base. As a BDR, you’ll be on the front lines of our sales efforts, identifying potential clients, generating leads, and nurturing opportunities to connect them with our solutions.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Proactively research and identify potential customers in target markets.

2. Reach out to prospects via
s, LinkedIn, and other communication channels.

3. Qualify leads to assess fit and interest, ensuring alignment with our services.

4. Schedule meetings or product demos between qualified leads and Sales Development Representatives.

5. Maintain accurate records of lead interactions and update CRM systems accordingly.

6. Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to execute campaigns and optimize lead generation strategies.

7. Stay up-to-date on industry trends and our product/service offerings to effectively communicate value propositions.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

- 2 - 3 years of experience in sales, business development, or a similar role (entry-level candidates with strong communication skills and a hunger to learn are also encouraged to apply).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build rapport quickly.

- Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and eager to exceed targets.

- Proficiency in extracting data from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other professional networks

- Must have a well-optimized LinkedIn account with atleast a minimum of 300 connections that can be used for prospecting

- Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, PipeDrive) is a plus.

- Comfortable with cold outreach and prospecting.



Who we are:

Acadium started with the belief that anyone, anywhere, should be able to get the skills and experience they need to start their career without barriers like price, schedule, or location getting in their way. Acadium gives anyone the tools, support, and mentorship they need to launch their dream career. Acadium is the only platform that provides real work experience, accessible to everyone. Acadium began in 2017 with a team of 3 co-founders: Richard Shaw, Marco Tundo, and Moe Abbas. Since then, they’ve attracted more than 120,000 student members and over 50,000 businesses to connect through the apprenticeship marketplace. Our team is growing and looking for people who are motivated, intelligent, and committed to making education accessible to join our team.



What we value:

Integrity - Be trustworthy in your actions

Care - Treat your teammates and our community as you would want to be treated

Curiosity - Ask questions. Always state your assumptions

Tenacity - Persevere when times are tough

Discipline - Be consistent in your actions

Ambition - Aspire to become better every day

Service -Serve your community to the best of your abilities.



Interested applicants may send updated CVs and LinkedIn URLs to the contact person's
 address indicated below

 Subject: Business Development Representative

**Note: Only applicants who submit their resumes and LinkedIn links to 
 will be evaluated.

title: Email Copywriter
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a talented and experienced
 Copywriter to join our remote team. In this role, you will craft compelling, conversion-focused
 campaigns that engage our audience, build brand loyalty, and drive measurable results. If you have a passion for writing persuasive copy and a proven track record in
 marketing, we want to hear from you.



What You'll Do



- Write high-converting
 copy including newsletters, promotional campaigns, welcome sequences, and drip campaigns

- Develop compelling subject lines and preview text that maximize open rates

- Craft clear and persuasive calls-to-action (CTAs) that drive clicks and conversions

- Collaborate with the marketing team to align
 content with overall brand messaging

- A/B test subject lines, copy, and CTAs to continuously improve performance

- Segment and tailor messaging for different audience groups

- Analyze campaign metrics (open rates, CTR, conversions) and use data to optimize future
s

- Maintain a consistent brand voice across all
 communications



Requirements



Must-Have Experience:

- Minimum 2 years of professional
 copywriting experience

- Proven portfolio of
 campaigns with measurable results

- Strong understanding of
 marketing best practices and CAN-SPAM/GDPR compliance

- Experience with
 platforms such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, or similar

- Excellent written English with strong grammar, spelling, and editing skills

- Ability to write in different brand voices and adapt tone for different audiences



Nice to Have:

- Experience in e-commerce, SaaS, or digital marketing niches

- Familiarity with SEO principles and how they apply to
 content

- Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS for
 formatting

- Experience with copywriting frameworks such as AIDA, PAS, or StoryBrand

title: Remote Graphic & Web Designer (Adobe Suite & Elementor)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Web Designer with a strong foundation in graphic design to join our remote team. This role requires advanced visual design expertise, exceptional attention to detail, and hands-on experience creating and maintaining websites in WordPress using Elementor. The ideal candidate is first and foremost a designer who understands branding, layout, typography, and visual storytelling, and can translate those skills into high-performing, well-structured websites.



This position is not for developers who only assemble templates. You must be able to design original visual systems, create polished graphic materials, and execute complete websites that reflect each client’s identity and goals.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design custom, brand-aligned websites in WordPress using Elementor, with a strong emphasis on visual hierarchy, spacing, typography, and responsiveness.

- Create high-quality graphic materials for digital use, including website visuals, banners, social media graphics, brand identity, and photo editing is a plus.

- Use Adobe Creative Suite at an advanced level to design original layouts and visual elements that integrate seamlessly into web builds.

- Maintain and update existing websites, including design refinements, layout adjustments, blog posts, city pages, and client-requested changes.

- Review and optimize website pages for visual consistency, usability, clarity, and SEO-friendly structure.

- Manage projects from concept through launch, ensuring design accuracy, consistency, and on-time delivery.

- Collaborate with the Art Director and internal team, proactively contributing design ideas and improvements.



Qualifications:

3+ years of professional experience designing and building websites in WordPress.

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop & Illustrator.

Strong eye for detail with proven ability to design polished, original graphic materials.

Ability to design and build complete websites from scratch using Elementor.

Highly organized and capable of managing multiple projects simultaneously.



A portfolio is required. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT PROVIDE A PORTFOLIO.



Nice-to-Have Skills:

Experience with Slack and Asana.

Additional language skills are a plus.



Fluent or native-level English proficiency is required.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable Graphic Designer to support ongoing design needs across multiple brands and clients. This role is ideal for a designer who enjoys variety, works efficiently, and can translate ideas into clean, professional visuals.



Responsibilities

Create high-quality graphics for social media, marketing campaigns, websites, and ads

Design digital assets such as banners, promotional graphics, and branded content

Edit and enhance images using Adobe Photoshop

Create vector designs, layouts, and logos using Adobe Illustrator

Follow brand guidelines while bringing creative ideas to life

Collaborate with marketing and operations teams to meet deadlines



Required Skills & Qualifications

Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop (required)

Strong understanding of design principles, layout, color, and typography

Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines



Nice to Have

Experience with social media graphics and digital marketing

Familiarity with Canva or other design tools

Basic knowledge of branding and marketing concepts



What We Offer

Flexible schedule (part-time or per-project)

Remote work

Ongoing design opportunities

Clear direction, fast feedback, and consistent projects



 Kindly submit your CV, portfolio link and Video introduction link explaining your experience and background

title: YouTube Editor LONG FORM 20-30 Min
description:
YOUTUBE



You're Not Just an Editor. You're a Storyteller Who Lives for the Ocean.

We're Expedition Drenched, a YouTube adventure channel currently based in Cebu, Philippines, documenting life aboard two expedition sailboats as we prepare to circumnavigate Australia.

We need a long term Video Editor and Social Media Manager who can grow with us.



You must be:

A natural adventure storyteller who knows how to open a video with a hook that stops the scroll and builds an arc that keeps people watching to the end.

Skilled at colour grading underwater and ocean footage.

Confident cleaning and shaping audio recorded outdoors in wind and open water environments.



Across YouTube and Instagram, knowing what works and what gets ignored.

To apply:

Send your CV, a short note on why this role is for you, and links to at least two editing examples. Ocean or underwater footage in your reel goes straight to the top.

We are not looking for someone to fill a seat. We are looking for someone who feels this in their chest the same way we do.

title: Finance and Accounting Supervisor
description:
Summary

Job Summary



We are seeking a highly experienced and strategically minded Finance and Accounting Supervisor to lead and oversee the full financial, managerial accounting, tax, and treasury functions of our group of companies. The Finance and Accounting Supervisor will be responsible for ensuring sound financial governance, borrowing and funding oversight, accounting and tax compliance, and long-term financial strategy aligned with the organization’s growth objectives.



This role requires exceptional professionalism, integrity, maturity, and leadership. The successful candidate will act as a trusted advisor to executive leadership, providing clear financial insight, risk management, and strategic direction while maintaining strong operational control over all finance-related functions.



Key Responsibilities



Lead and oversee all financial, managerial accounting, tax, and treasury functions across the group



Prepare, review, and approve consolidated financial statements and tax returns in accordance with applicable accounting standards



Ensure full compliance with statutory requirements, tax legislation, and financial reporting obligations



Oversee borrowing, funding structures, cash flow management, and relationships with financial institutions



Direct budgeting, forecasting, and long-term financial planning processes



Provide financial analysis and strategic insights to support executive and board-level decision-making



Oversee tax planning, submissions, audits, and engagements relating to income tax, payroll tax, and other applicable taxes



Manage relationships with external auditors, regulators, banks, and professional advisors



Design, implement, and maintain robust internal controls, financial governance, and risk management frameworks



Identify financial, operational, and regulatory risks and develop mitigation strategies



Lead, mentor, and develop the finance team, fostering a culture of accountability, accuracy, and continuous improvement



Oversee finance-related projects and ensure timely delivery across multiple workstreams



Qualifications & Requirements



Certified Public Accountant (CPA) designation or equivalent professional qualification (mandatory)



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (Master’s degree or MBA advantageous)



Minimum of 3–5 years post-qualification experience in senior financial leadership roles



Strong technical knowledge of accounting standards, tax legislation, and financial regulations



Proven experience in financial reporting, tax compliance, audit management, and treasury functions



Demonstrated ability to operate at both strategic and operational levels



Advanced proficiency in accounting systems, financial reporting tools, and Microsoft Excel



Exceptional attention to detail, analytical ability, and sound commercial judgment



Strong leadership, communication, project management, and multi-tasking skills

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Do You Live and Breathe Adventure Content?



We're Expedition Drenched, a YouTube adventure channel based in Cebu, Philippines, documenting life aboard two expedition sailboats as we prepare to circumnavigate through world.



We are looking for a passionate Social Media Manager to join our remote team long term.

You must be able to:

Repurpose long form YouTube content into engaging Shorts and Reels. Write captions that feel human, not corporate. Manage and grow our YouTube and Instagram presence consistently. Engage authentically with our community. Track what is working and report back simply and clearly.

You are the right person if:

You actually watch adventure and ocean content in your spare time. You understand what makes someone stop scrolling. You take ownership and don't need to be chased for updates.

To apply:

Send your CV, a short note on why this role excites you, and examples of social media accounts you have managed. Bonus points if you follow channels like ours already.

We want someone who gets it without us having to explain it.

title: Urgent Hiring: L2/L3 IT Support
description:

We are a rapidly growing small IT operation based in Indiana, USA, with over a decade of experience serving our customers. As a laid-back yet fast-growing team, we are looking for passionate and driven individuals to join us in expanding our operations.

title: Track & Trace
description:
REQUIRED:

2+ years of Track & Trace Experience

Ability to commute to Quezon City, if necessary

McLeod TMS Experience is Preferred



Duties and Responsibilities:

The Track & Trace Associate communicates with customers and carriers promptly and accurately. They care and connect with both parties on a high level with empathy. They view the customers' problems as their own and seek to always deliver honest and helpful solutions. Their goal is to ensure successful pickup and delivery to fulfill customer needs.



Primary Responsibilities:

• Report to Operations Manager 

• Provide exceptional customer service to the team's customers and carriers.

• Communicate daily with carriers, customers, and employees to ensure on-time pick-ups and deliveries 

• Enter load information; tracking/tracing shipments in the customers' software system

• Field general customer questions; issue resolution

• Answer daily track and trace
s

• Send updates to customers as directed in template provided by National Account Manager

• Daily tracking and updating status of loads via:

title: Business Development & Proposals Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly organized Business Development & Proposals Coordinator to support the growth of our strategic communications and consulting firm. This role focuses on researching new opportunities, coordinating proposal development, and managing the administrative and operational systems behind our business development efforts.



You will play a critical role in helping the company identify and pursue new contracts, particularly with government agencies, foundations, and large institutions. This role requires exceptional organization, strong written communication skills, and the ability to manage complex deadlines across multiple contributors.

 

Key Responsibilities



Opportunity Research

• Identify and research new business opportunities, RFPs, RFQs, and grant opportunities

• Monitor government procurement portals, industry listservs, and opportunity databases

• Prepare concise summaries of opportunities including scope, deadlines, and recommendations on whether to pursue



Proposal Coordination

• Organize all administrative functions of proposal development

• Prepare outlines and proposal development plans

• Track deadlines and milestones for each proposal

• Create and manage proposal timelines in Asana

• Coordinate all internal contributors and ensure deadlines are met

• Communicate with issuing agencies regarding questions, clarifications, and submissions



Proposal Development Support

• Draft selected sections of proposals

• Format documents and ensure compliance with submission requirements

• Coordinate signatures, forms, attachments, and required documentation

• Manage final packaging and submission of proposals



Business Development Operations

• Maintain the company’s pipeline of active opportunities

• Develop and maintain proposal content libraries

• Maintain formatted staff resumes and case studies for proposals

• Track proposal submissions and outcomes



Administrative Compliance

• Maintain business certifications and licenses required for proposal eligibility

• Manage company registrations in procurement systems and vendor portals

• Maintain access credentials and compliance requirements needed for submissions

 

Required Skills

• Strong research and analytical skills

• Excellent written English

• Experience coordinating proposals or RFP responses

• Exceptional organization and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously

• Proficiency with Google Docs, Microsoft Word, and PDF formatting

• Project management software experience (Asana strongly preferred)

• Ability to read and interpret complex instructions and requirements

 

Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting government proposals or grants

• Experience in consulting, communications, marketing, or professional services

• Familiarity with U.S. government procurement portals

• Proposal writing experience

• Resume and proposal formatting experience

 

Ideal Candidate

You are highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing complex deadlines. You enjoy research, problem-solving, and coordinating teams to produce high-quality work under pressure. You take ownership of systems, proactively identify opportunities, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

title: Video Editor + Graphic Designer (Performance Marketing | Ecommerce)
description:
We’re a performance-focused ecommerce brand scaling through systematic creative testing on Meta.



We don’t care about “pretty.” We care about what converts.



We’re looking for a video editor with strong graphic design skills who understands direct response marketing and performance-driven creatives.

What You’ll Do

? Create multiple hook variations from one winning concept

? Turn video winners into static derivatives

? Design performance-focused static ads

? Iterate quickly based on data

? Work inside a creative testing system



We test aggressively. We move fast. We scale what works.



What We Need From You



? Strong understanding of direct response principles

? You understand hooks, benefits, proof, and urgency

You’re NOT a Fit If

Growth Opportunity

To Apply



Send:



Portfolio with direct response ads only



2–3 examples where you created multiple variations from one concept



Include the word banana in your
 subject line so we know you read the full job post.

title: Bookkeeper (Remote) – Construction & Small Business Accounting
description:

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.

dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

title: Event Creative Designer - PH
description:
!!! PLEASE READ THE WHOLE LISTING BEFORE APPLYING !!!



Event Creative Designer (Enterprise Marketing)



We’re looking for an Event Creative Designer to own and elevate the visual experience of Enterprise and Gold-tier MedSpa events across the Moxie platform.



This role sits at the intersection of Creative, Events, Paid Media, and Marketing Services. You’ll turn event strategies and offers into cohesive, high-performing visual systems—across print, social, SMS, and digital touchpoints—while operating inside a structured, scalable creative workflow.



You won’t be starting from scratch. You’ll inherit a robust Event Look Book, Brand Bank templates, and a live creative ticketing system. Your job is to execute at a high level, improve what exists, and help define what world-class event creative looks like for 600+ medspas.



This is a role for a creative operator who loves both design and systems—someone who can ship beautiful work at speed while building repeatable frameworks behind the scenes.







What you’ll do

- Own Enterprise event creative execution: Deliver on-time creative for 8–10 events per quarter across print, social, SMS, and -digital—consistently meeting SLAs and reducing revision cycles.

- Operate within and improve systems: Work inside our Asana-based Event Creative Ticketing System while refining templates, workflows, and QA standards to improve speed and accuracy.

- Translate event strategy into visual systems: Develop cohesive event identities (menus, invites, story graphics, SMS visuals, in-spa signage) optimized for each channel.

- Evolve reusable creative kits: Turn high-performing themes (launch parties, tox events, seasonal promos, BFCM, etc.) into documented Canva systems that scale across the portfolio.

- Collaborate cross-functionally: Align creative with Events, Meta, and PSM teams to ensure campaigns are visually cohesive across paid, organic, and in-spa experiences.

- Improve QA & consistency: Reduce creative-related errors (dates, logos, offers, branding) by following structured QA processes and proactively clarifying briefs.

- Integrate AI thoughtfully: Use AI tools to generate mood boards, variants, and scaled creative production—while maintaining brand integrity and design quality.

- Document and share learnings: Capture high-performing visual “plays” and contribute to evolving the Event Look Book and creative playbooks.



What we’re looking for:

- 3–5 years of hands-on digital design experience (agency, in-house, or freelance), ideally in aesthetics, beauty, wellness, or lifestyle brands.

- Strong Canva production experience (required), with the ability to efficiently produce high volumes of polished assets without sacrificing quality.

- Proven ability to build cohesive visual systems across multiple formats: social (feed, Stories, Reels covers), print, web, and SMS/digital.

- Experience working inside structured workflows (Asana, Monday, or similar ticketing systems).

- Strong collaboration skills with non-design partners—comfortable discussing timelines, tradeoffs, and scope.

- A balance of creative taste and operational discipline—you can design beautifully and ship consistently at scale.



Nice to have:

- Experience with MedSpa or aesthetics marketing.

- Background in event-driven marketing (launches, VIP nights, promos).

- Experience collaborating with paid media teams (Meta, etc.).

- Comfort working on distributed or remote teams.



Why join us?



Moxie enables nurses to become entrepreneurs and grow successful, independent MedSpa businesses. Events are one of the most powerful revenue-driving levers for our providers—and creative is the visual engine that makes them succeed.



In this role, you’ll:

- Own the visual spine of Enterprise event marketing

- Work inside a system that already has real traction and revenue impact

- Ship high-volume, high-visibility work that providers are proud to share

- Help define scalable creative standards for hundreds of medspas

- Grow into a creative systems leader as the function expands



This is a rare opportunity to combine strong design instincts with operational ownership inside a fast-scaling platform business.



If you’re excited about building creative systems that scale—without losing taste or quality—we’d love to hear from you.



Please use the link below to apply:

title: Social Media Content Creator and Advisor
description:
Scope of Work: Social Media Content Creator and Advisor



1. Project Overview

Bomani Resort, located in Kikambala, Kilifi County, Kenya, is a unique boutique resort and 12-acre working farm offering a blend of Culture, Comfort, and Connection. The resort provides diverse accommodations, including stone cottages and glamping tents, and serves as a gateway to authentic Kenyan traditions, village life, and nearby beaches.



The objective of this engagement is to hire a Social Media Content Creator and Advisor to elevate the resort's digital presence, increase brand awareness, and drive bookings through strategic storytelling and high-quality content curation. Applicants are encouraged to review the resort's website at 
 for a comprehensive understanding of our brand and offerings.



2. Roles and Responsibilities

The selected professional will act as both a creative executor and a strategic advisor. The primary focus will be on transforming raw assets into compelling narratives that resonate with local and international audiences.



Category Description of Responsibilities

Content Creation Edit and curate unedited video and photography provided by the resort. Create engaging Reels, TikToks, and static posts that highlight the "farm-to-resort" lifestyle.

Strategic Advisory Develop a monthly content calendar aligned with seasonal trends and resort promotions. Advise on platform-specific strategies (Instagram,
, TikTok).

Community Management Monitor and respond to comments, messages, and inquiries. Engage with relevant travel influencers and local community accounts to expand reach.

Brand Consistency Ensure all digital communication reflects the resort’s core values: Culture, Comfort, and Connection. Maintain a consistent visual aesthetic and tone of voice.



3. Key Deliverables

The Consultant is expected to deliver the following items on a recurring and project-basis:



• Monthly Content Calendar: A detailed schedule of posts, stories, and reels across all active platforms, submitted for approval 7 days before the start of each month.

• Edited Visual Assets: A minimum of 3 high-quality Reels/Videos and 5 static/carousel posts per week, utilizing the provided raw footage and photography.

• Platform Optimization: Complete audit and optimization of Instagram and
 profiles, including bio updates, highlight covers, and SEO-friendly descriptions.

• Monthly Performance Report: A concise summary of key metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth) and actionable insights for the following month.



4. Content Themes and Pillars

To ensure a diverse and engaging feed, the content should revolve around the following pillars:



The Farm-to-Resort Experience: Showcasing the 12-acre working farm, fruit trees, and the unique tranquility of staying on a scenic agricultural property.



Authentic Kenyan Culture: Highlighting village walks, local food tasting, and excursions to historical sites that offer guests a deep connection to the region.



Diverse Accommodations: Creating specific features for the Langi Langi cottage, glamping tents, and studios to show the range of "comfort meets nature."



Guest Stories & Testimonials: Utilizing existing and new reviews to build trust and social proof among potential visitors.



5. Project Timeline and Logistics

• Contract Duration: Initial 3-month pilot period with the option for long-term renewal based on performance.

• Asset Handoff: The resort will provide raw, unedited video and photography via a shared Google Drive or Dropbox folder on a weekly/bi-weekly basis.

• Communication: Weekly 30-minute check-in calls to discuss upcoming events, promotions, and content performance.



6. Qualifications and Requirements

The ideal candidate should possess:

1 Proven experience in travel and hospitality social media management.

2 Advanced skills in mobile video editing (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush, etc.) and graphic design (Canva, Photoshop).

3 A deep understanding of the Kenyan tourism landscape and current social media trends.

4 Excellent written English and the ability to craft evocative captions.

5 Submission of a short (approx. 30-second) sample reel demonstrating their creative approach to promoting a boutique resort, utilizing provided or self-sourced visuals.



7. Proposed Compensation

Compensation will be structured at $5 per hour, for an estimated 10 hours per week. Candidates are invited to submit their proposals based on the deliverables outlined in Section 3.



Prepared by: Bomani Resort Management     Date: March 6, 2026

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Credit Repair Disputer (With proven results) & Customer Support Specialist to assist with backend credit repair operations and client communication. In this role, you will be responsible for reviewing client credit reports, processing dispute rounds through Credit Repair Cloud, and ensuring all client files are accurate and up to date.



Your responsibilities will include reviewing credit monitoring reports to identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items and generating dispute letters to the credit bureaus. You will track dispute rounds, update client records inside the CRM, and ensure all disputes are properly processed and documented.



This role also includes handling onboarding for new clients. You will collect and organize onboarding documents, upload and manage client files in the CRM, and ensure all required information is completed before dispute processing begins.



In addition to dispute work, you will assist with customer support by responding to client inquiries, providing updates on dispute progress, and helping maintain clear and professional communication with clients throughout the process.



You will also be responsible for conducting monthly audits of assigned client files to verify that disputes were processed correctly, documentation is complete, and all client records are properly maintained according to company procedures.



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please include the word ORBIT at the beginning of your application message.

title: Real Estate VA - Inside Sales Agent
description:
Real Estate Virtual Assistant - Full-Time Inside Sales Agent

(Must have prior real estate experience)



Our St. Louis, MO, USA-based Real Estate Investments company, with over a decade in real estate investing, is seeking a dedicated and experienced real estate professional to join our growing team! If you enjoy negotiating deals, have a proven track record in real estate sales, and are looking for a remote opportunity where you can make an impact, please read the details and apply below by reading the how to apply instructions.



Job Description:

We are hiring for the position of Real Estate Inside Sales Agent. In this role, you will work remotely and be responsible for speaking with homeowners, gathering property information, negotiating offers, and securing contracts for our investment properties. Your main focus will be on acquiring distressed properties at favorable terms by getting property info, making offers, negotiating deals, and diligently following up to close sales. You will use your sales expertise and relationship-building skills to engage potential sellers, gather necessary information, and document interactions in our CRM system.



Responsibilities:

- Conduct outbound calls and send
s to manage real estate buying opportunities.

- Make offers to potential sellers and negotiate terms to get our offers accepted.

- Follow up on all leads and negotiations to ensure deal closure.

- Utilize effective sales strategies and scripts to handle objections and convey our company’s value proposition.

- Maintain detailed records of all interactions and negotiations in our CRM system.

- Collaborate with other tea
mbers to ensure seamless transaction processes.



Qualifications:

- High Energy and Enthusiastic Personality: You thrive in a fast-paced, engaging environment.

- 2+ Years of Real Estate Sales and Negotiations Experience: Proven background in closing deals.

- Exceptional English Communication Skills: Fluent in both written and verbal English.

- Fearless Negotiator: Eager to engage in challenging conversations, overcome objections, and secure agreements.

- Organized and Detail-Oriented: Excellent time management skills.

- Technologically Proficient: Experience using CRM systems and quick to learn new technologies.

- Problem Solver: Ability to navigate complex negotiations effectively.



System Requirements:

- Reliable high-speed laptop or desktop computer.

- DSL Internet connection with a minimum speed of 40+ Mbps.

- Noise-canceling headset.

- Must have a dedicated quiet home office setup



Performance Metrics:

- Talk to a certain number of sellers daily, weekly, and monthly.

- Achieve a target number of accepted offers each month.

- Consistently follow up to close deals within expected timeframes.



Career Growth & Training:

- Opportunities for advancement into leadership roles for high-performing individuals.

- Professional training provided to enhance your skills.



Company Culture:

- Dynamic and Collaborative: We value teamwork, integrity, and a drive for excellence.

- Supportive Environment: We believe in ongoing professional growth and celebrating achievements.

- High Ethical Standards: We conduct business with honesty and transparency.



What We’re Looking For:

- Self-motivated professionals with a positive attitude.

- Candidates with a dedicated home office setup.

- Ability to thrive in a remote role with excellent time management skills.

- Experience in real estate sales



What We’re Not Looking For:

- Candidates who cannot commit to our specified working hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM CST.

- Minimal Communication Skills: If you struggle with fluent English communication, both written and verbal.

- Lack of Self-Motivation and Enthusiasm.

title: Real Estate Inside Sales Agent
description:
Real Estate Virtual Assistant - Full-Time Inside Sales Agent

(Must have prior real estate experience)



Our St. Louis, MO, USA-based Real Estate Investments company, with over a decade in real estate investing, is seeking a dedicated and experienced real estate professional to join our growing team! If you enjoy negotiating deals, have a proven track record in real estate sales, and are looking for a remote opportunity where you can make an impact, please read the details and apply below by reading the how to apply instructions.



Job Description:

We are hiring for the position of Real Estate Inside Sales Agent. In this role, you will work remotely and be responsible for speaking with homeowners, gathering property information, negotiating offers, and securing contracts for our investment properties. Your main focus will be on acquiring distressed properties at favorable terms by getting property info, making offers, negotiating deals, and diligently following up to close sales. You will use your sales expertise and relationship-building skills to engage potential sellers, gather necessary information, and document interactions in our CRM system.



Responsibilities:

- Conduct outbound calls and send
s to manage real estate buying opportunities.

- Make offers to potential sellers and negotiate terms to get our offers accepted.

- Follow up on all leads and negotiations to ensure deal closure.

- Utilize effective sales strategies and scripts to handle objections and convey our company’s value proposition.

- Maintain detailed records of all interactions and negotiations in our CRM system.

- Collaborate with other tea
mbers to ensure seamless transaction processes.



Qualifications:

- High Energy and Enthusiastic Personality: You thrive in a fast-paced, engaging environment.

- 2+ Years of Real Estate Sales and Negotiations Experience: Proven background in closing deals.

- Exceptional English Communication Skills: Fluent in both written and verbal English.

- Fearless Negotiator: Eager to engage in challenging conversations, overcome objections, and secure agreements.

- Organized and Detail-Oriented: Excellent time management skills.

- Technologically Proficient: Experience using CRM systems and quick to learn new technologies.

- Problem Solver: Ability to navigate complex negotiations effectively.



System Requirements:

- Reliable high-speed laptop or desktop computer.

- DSL Internet connection with a minimum speed of 40+ Mbps.

- Noise-canceling headset.

- Must have a dedicated quiet home office setup



Performance Metrics:

- Talk to a certain number of sellers daily, weekly, and monthly.

- Achieve a target number of accepted offers each month.

- Consistently follow up to close deals within expected timeframes.



Career Growth & Training:

- Opportunities for advancement into leadership roles for high-performing individuals.

- Professional training provided to enhance your skills.



Company Culture:

- Dynamic and Collaborative: We value teamwork, integrity, and a drive for excellence.

- Supportive Environment: We believe in ongoing professional growth and celebrating achievements.

- High Ethical Standards: We conduct business with honesty and transparency.



What We’re Looking For:

- Self-motivated professionals with a positive attitude.

- Candidates with a dedicated home office setup.

- Ability to thrive in a remote role with excellent time management skills.

- Experience in real estate sales



What We’re Not Looking For:

- Candidates who cannot commit to our specified working hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM CST.

- Minimal Communication Skills: If you struggle with fluent English communication, both written and verbal.

- Lack of Self-Motivation and Enthusiasm.

- Candidates unfamiliar with CRMs and resistant to learning new systems or scripts.

- Candidates with inconsistent internet and power supply or a disruptive workspace.

- Candidates who are easily flustered, shy, or fearful when making calls.

- Offline or Non-Voice Preference: This is a phone-based sales position.



Pay Rate:

Starting up to $6/hr, with performance bonuses. Pay is issued on the 1st and 15th of each month (CST).



Working Hours:

Monday to Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM CST. A 30-minute lunch break and two 15-minute breaks per shift.

 your updated resume and a brief personalized audio or video recording to:
