title: Online Arbitrage Sourcer and Admin
description:
Compensation: 50,000 – 60,000 PHP / Month, Depending on Experience + Performance Bonuses

Location: Fully remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, Flexible Hours

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Bi-Weekly

 

Job Overview

We're hiring an experienced Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer and Admin to join a growing Amazon FBA business currently doing $1M+ in annual revenue. Sourcing is your primary job, 80% of your time will be spent finding, evaluating, and purchasing profitable leads. The other 20% goes toward keeping the back end running smoothly, things like inventory reconciliation, prep center communication, and account health monitoring. If you're someone who's great at sourcing and can also handle the admin side without being micromanaged, this role is for you.



You'll be the first full-time hire on this team, which means you have a real opportunity to grow into a lead role. Once you've proven yourself, you'll have the chance to help bring on and manage additional sourcers underneath you. If you're a seasoned OA sourcer who wants to be trusted, well-compensated, and given room to grow, this is your role.



 

Responsibilities?

Source profitable OA leads daily using tools like Tactical Arbitrage, Keepa, and seller storefronts

Evaluate leads using sales rank history, price trends, offer counts, and margin analysis before submitting

Submit qualified leads into a structured Google Sheet pipeline

Purchase leads and encode billing and shipping information accurately and consistently

Hit daily and monthly spend targets with minimal supervision (starting goal: $50K/month)

Stay in regular contact with the prep center to sort out any inventory or receiving issues on your own

Keep inventory records reconciled between the prep center and Amazon, and flag anything that looks off

Keep sourcing and purchasing data organized and up to date in the existing tracking systems

Keep an eye on Amazon account health and let management know right away if something needs attention

Track FBA inbound shipments and bring any missing or short quantities to management's attention so invoices and appeals can be filed on time

Bring your own sourcing approach to the table, if something works better than what we're doing, we want to know

As the team grows, help bring new sourcers up to speed and take on a lead role

 

Requirements

2+ years of hands-on OA sourcing experience for Amazon FBA

Strong proficiency with Keepa, you know how to read a chart and make a confident buying decision

Experience using sourcing tools such as Tactical Arbitrage, Seller Amp, or equivalent

Able to find 3-5+ viable leads per hour and maintain consistent daily output

Trustworthy and professional when handling sensitive payment and financial information

Highly organized and detail-oriented with a strong ability to manage multiple tasks without dropping the ball

Self-directed: you don't need daily hand-holding, you show up and get it done

Solid knowledge of Amazon Seller Central operations including inventory management, account health, and shipment workflows

Experience with prep center communication and inventory reconciliation

Familiarity with the full OA purchasing process from lead sourcing to order placement

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work setup

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience managing or mentoring other sourcers

Familiarity with prep center workflows and FBA shipment reconciliation

Experience using AI-assisted scraping tools or automation for lead generation

Comfortable building or refining sourcing SOPs and processes

Experience with Google Sheets, including formula-based tracking systems

 

What to Expect in Your First 30 Days

Complete onboarding and review our existing systems, SOPs, and lead pipeline setup

Watch our internal Sourcing 101 training course, even experienced sourcers have found it valuable

Check-in call with our team to close any knowledge gaps and align on expectations

Begin sourcing immediately, the infrastructure is already built, you plug in and run

Admin work is minimal at first while you find your footing, focus is entirely on sourcing quality and consistency



To Apply

title: Meta Ads Media Buyer – Lead Generation Campaigns – Up to $3,000/month
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Meta Ads Media Buyer to join our growing lead generation agency.



At Guidsagency we run high-performing Meta advertising campaigns for construction and home-service companies in the Netherlands.



The goal is simple:



Generate high-quality leads that convert into real customers.



This is not an entry-level role.



We are specifically looking for someone with real hands-on experience running Meta Ads campaigns, preferably within lead generation.



If you understand how to analyze performance, test creatives, and scale campaigns, this role could be a great fit.



About The Role



As a Media Buyer, you will manage and optimize 30–40 Meta Ads accounts for our clients.



Your job is to keep campaigns stable, profitable, and continuously improving.



You will monitor performance daily, test new creative concepts, and identify opportunities to improve results across multiple accounts.



This role requires someone who can:



• Think analytically

• Work independently

• Diagnose problems quickly

• Continuously test and improve campaigns



You will work closely with our internal team while maintaining full ownership of campaign performance.



What You Will Be Doing



• Managing and optimizing Meta Ads campaigns for lead generation clients

• Monitoring campaign performance daily

• Analyzing key metrics such as:



Cost per lead (CPL)

Campaign stability

Creative performance

• Testing new ad creatives and identifying winning angles

• Diagnosing performance issues and implementing optimizations

• Managing multiple ad accounts while maintaining stable results



Our Clients

All of our clients operate in the construction and home-services industry in the Netherlands.



Examples include:



• Roofing companies

• Solar installation companies

• Window replacement companies

• Renovation contractors

• Bathroom renovation companies



The objective of every campaign is clear:



Generate qualified leads that turn into real customers.



Requirements



To qualify for this role you should have:



• Proven experience running Meta Ads campaigns

• Experience with lead generation campaigns

• Strong understanding of campaign structure and optimization

• Experience managing multiple ad accounts simultaneously

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• The ability to diagnose performance changes quickly



You should be comfortable working with campaign data and making decisions based on numbers.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is creative, analytical, and highly independent.



The ideal candidate:



• Is highly creative with ad concepts, hooks, and messaging

• Understands how to test and identify winning ad angles

• Can analyze campaign performance and react quickly

• Is organized when managing multiple accounts

• Can work without constant supervision



We are not looking for someone who needs instructions for every small change.



We are looking for someone who:



• Takes ownership of their work

• Solves problems independently

• Continuously improves campaigns

• Enjoys testing and optimizing ads



Working Environment



This is a remote position.



Our team operates within the Amsterdam / Central European Time zone (CET).

Because our clients are based in the Netherlands, you must be comfortable working within this time zone.



Compensation



Compensation depends on experience and performance.

Media buyers in this role can earn up to $3,000 per month or more depending on experience and results.



This role also offers long-term growth opportunities as our agency continues to scale.



Hiring Process



Our hiring process consists of three steps:



Application Form

Interview Call

Practical Skill Test



We carefully review every candidate to ensure we hire experienced media buyers who understand performance marketing and lead generation.



Apply Here



If you believe you are a strong fit for this role and have real experience running Meta Ads campaigns, please complete our application form below.



Apply here:





Please take your time when completing the form.

title: Document Editors
description:
We are looking for someone to fulfil an ongoing role editing Ai documents against an audio file.



The role will include:

 - Taking the Ai document and copying to client template.

 - Making sure the format / editing is in line with client template.

 - Listening to audio file to make sure allocation of speakers is correct.



You must have Microsoft Word installed on your computer and files must be returned within a 24 hour window.



The hours of work are flexible but we expect at least 9-2pm UK time as standard. A high level of English is expected.



Please state your expected per hour rate (we pay based on audio duration and number of minutes the file lasts).



Many thanks, Andrew

title: Ecommerce Operations Manager – Take Over & Improve Founder-Led Shopify Operations
description:
We operate and scale fashion ecommerce dropshipping brands on Shopify, promoted organically on TikTok.



One of our brands has built a strong Trustpilot reputation and a loyal base of returning customers. We are growing steadily and plan to launch additional stores this year.



The founder is currently managing core operational systems, and we are now looking for an Ecommerce Operations Manager who can take over these systems and improve them progressively.



This is a hands-on ownership role inside a growing ecommerce business.



You will not be starting from zero — you will be taking over existing systems and making them stronger over time.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will take over the day-to-day operational systems currently managed by the founder and improve them step by step.



This is not a beginner VA role, and it is not a corporate executive role either.

It is a hands-on ownership role inside a growing ecommerce business.



Your responsibilities include:



-Managing communication and coordination with multiple Chinese suppliers

-Ensuring orders are fulfilled correctly and on time

-Preventing wrong fulfillment and reducing operational mistakes

-Tracking and improving dispute handling and refund decisions

-Overseeing Trustpilot reputation management

-Supervising and improving the work of our Customer Support VA

-Maintaining operational trackers and reports

-Improving SOPs gradually as the business grows

-Identifying small system improvements that reduce errors and increase efficiency



You are not expected to rebuild everything immediately.

You are expected to understand the current systems, take ownership, and improve them progressively.



This role requires structure, accountability, and a long-term mindset.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



-Someone with Shopify ecommerce experience

-Someone who has handled suppliers or fulfillment before

-Someone who has dealt with disputes or refunds

-Someone who has supervised at least one tea
mber (even a small team)

-Someone organized, calm, and analytical

-Someone ambitious and ready to grow with the company



You do not need to have managed large teams or complex enterprise systems.



WHAT WE OFFER



-Hourly rate: 8 USD/hour 

-Full-time, long-term role

-Direct collaboration with the founder

-Opportunity to grow into a larger operations leadership role as we expand



We value consistency, ownership, and long-term collaboration.



HOW TO APPLY (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)



To apply, please follow these steps:



1) Change your application subject to:



“I want to take ownership of your operations Z”



2) Short Written Introduction (4–6 sentences)



Briefly explain:



-Your relevant ecommerce experience

-The approximate monthly revenue of the store you were most recently responsible for

-One operational responsibility you personally owned



3) Send your CV



4) Send a Loom video (3–5 minutes)



In your Loom, please answer the following:



1. Brief Background (1 minute)

-What type of ecommerce store have you worked on?

-What was the approximate monthly revenue?

-What were you personally responsible for?



2. Operational Thinking Scenario

Imagine you manage 3 suppliers fulfilling different SKUs.

Sometimes orders are fulfilled by the wrong supplier or delayed.

How would you structure a simple system to reduce these mistakes over time?



(We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to understand how you think.)



3. Ownership Example

Describe one operational problem you personally fixed.

-What was happening?

-What did you change?

-What improved?



4. Growth & Responsibility

Why are you interested in taking more ownership instead of staying in a purely execution role?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Shopify Theme & Product Page Optimization Specialist (Fashion E-Commerce)
description:
We operate and scale fashion ecommerce dropshipping brands on Shopify, promoted organically on TikTok.



Our stores are growing steadily, and as traffic increases, improving product page structure, cart flow, and upsell logic has a direct impact on sales and average order value.



We are now hiring a Shopify Theme & Product Page Optimization Specialist who will work directly inside our Shopify themes to improve structure, layout, and performance.



This is a hands-on implementation role with long-term growth potential.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will be responsible for improving the structure and performance of our Shopify themes, product pages, and cart experience.



Your main focus areas:



-Restructuring product page layout for clarity and higher conversion

-Improving cart and upsell structure (bundles, cross-sells, incentives)

-Optimizing theme sections and page hierarchy

-Refining mobile layout and shopping flow

-Implementing upsell and bundle logic inside Shopify

-Improving clarity, trust elements, and offer placement

-Testing layout improvements and measuring performance impact



This role is practical and hands-on inside Shopify themes.



It is not purely a graphic design role and not purely a development role.

It is about structured improvements that increase sales.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



-Someone with solid hands-on Shopify experience

-Someone comfortable modifying Shopify themes and sections

-Someone who understands how product page structure impacts sales

-Someone who has implemented upsells, bundles, or cart improvements

-Someone logical, detail-oriented, and structured

-Someone who wants to grow into a more advanced growth/optimization role over time



You do not need to be a senior CRO strategist.

You need a strong foundation and willingness to improve step by step.



REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT)



You should have:



-Experience working inside Shopify themes

-Experience modifying layout, sections, or theme structure

-Familiarity with upsell / bundle / cart apps

-Understanding of mobile layout and user flow

-Basic HTML / CSS knowledge (JavaScript is a plus, not required)

-Ability to explain your reasoning clearly

-Strong communication and organization skills



This role is not for someone who only installs apps without understanding structure.



WHAT WE OFFER



-Hourly rate: 9.0 – 9.5 USD/hour (based on experience)

-Part-time role (15–20 hours per week)

-Flexible working hours

-Long-term collaboration

-Opportunity to grow into a larger growth/optimization role as we expand



We value ownership, reliability, and long-term partnerships.



HOW TO APPLY (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)



To apply, please follow these steps:



1) Change your application subject to:



“I want to optimize your Shopify theme P”



2) Short Written Introduction (4–6 sentences)



Briefly explain:



-Your Shopify experience

-One theme you have worked with

-One structural change you personally implemented



3) Send your CV

4) Loom Video (3–5 minutes)

Please answer casually and clearly:



-What Shopify themes have you worked with?

-Have you ever modified sections or layout inside the theme?

-If you join our team and see a fashion product page that looks basic, what areas would you typically improve first?

-How would you approach improving the cart or adding upsells?

-Tell us about one improvement you made to a Shopify store and what changed as a result.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Chargeback Manager Dropshipping shopify
description:
We are looking for an experienced Chargeback Manager to join our team and take full responsibility for managing and fighting chargebacks across our Shopify dropshipping fashion stores.



We currently operate around 15 fashion webshops, and chargebacks come in on a daily basis. We need someone who can monitor disputes, collect strong evidence, and submit professional responses to banks and payment processors to maximize our win rate.



This is a role for someone who truly understands the ins and outs of chargebacks in Shopify dropshipping and knows exactly how to handle disputes effectively.



Responsibilities



Monitor incoming chargebacks daily across multiple Shopify stores



Investigate disputes and identify the reason codes



Collect and organize strong evidence (tracking details, customer communication, policies, order confirmations, etc.)



Prepare and submit chargeback responses to banks and payment processors



Maintain organized documentation for all disputes



Work proactively to reduce future chargebacks by identifying patterns and problems



Communicate clearly with our team about dispute status and outcomes



Requirements



Fluent English (written and spoken)



Proven experience handling chargebacks for Shopify dropshipping stores



Strong understanding of payment processors and dispute systems



Previous experience in fashion dropshipping is highly preferred



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Proactive mindset — someone who takes ownership and gets results



A true chargeback “killer” who knows how to win disputes



Compensation



This role is commission-based, meaning you will earn based on performance and successful dispute management. You will get a base fee, but the rest of the payment is based on the winning chargebacks



If you have deep experience with chargebacks and want to work with a fast-growing team managing multiple Shopify fashion stores, we’d love to hear from you.



If you are serious and have read everything please comment your whatsapp number + experience + the word 'Apple' so we know you have read everything.



Kind regards

title: Audit Manager at TaxAce - US Accounting Clients - CPA Required
description:
About Us

At TaxAce, we provide expert financial services including Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, Payroll, Agent Service of Process, Tax Resolution, Tax Planning, and CFO Services for businesses and entrepreneurs.



We’re guided by five core values:

• Integrity – Transparent guidance for informed decisions

• Communication – Clear, timely support that builds trust

• Accountability – Goal-focused with measurable results

• Respect – Personalized service with professionalism

• Education – Ongoing learning to stay ahead of tax changes



Our mission is to deliver reliable, high-quality financial support that empowers clients to grow with confidence.



Who You Are

You’re a highly experienced Certified Public Accountant (CPA) with a strong background in audit and US accounting standards. You thrive in a leadership role, confidently managing audit engagements, reviewing financial statements, and ensuring compliance with US GAAP.



You are detail-oriented, analytical, and comfortable working with US-based clients. You take ownership of engagements, lead teams effectively, and maintain strong communication with both clients and auditors.



Key Responsibilities

• Lead and manage audit engagements for US-based accounting clients

• Prepare, review, and approve financial statements and audit workpapers

• Serve as primary point of contact during external audits, including ownership of PBC schedules and auditor coordination

• Ensure compliance with US GAAP and applicable accounting standards

• Oversee month-end and year-end close processes

• Perform risk assessments and analytical reviews

• Design and document internal controls

• Prepare and review audit schedules independently

• Lead and mentor audit tea
mbers

• Manage multiple engagements while maintaining high-quality standards



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s Degree in Accountancy

• Active Philippine CPA license (required)

• 8+ years of total accounting experience

• Minimum 4 years in an external audit firm preferred

OR significant experience serving as primary company lead during Big 4 external audits

• At least 3 years in a managerial or senior supervisory role

• Experience handling US-based clients strongly preferred

• Experience preparing and reviewing audit workpapers and financial statements

• Experience leading engagements or audit teams



Technical Requirements

• Strong knowledge of US GAAP

• Strong understanding of ASC 606 revenue recognition

• Experience designing and documenting internal controls

• Experience performing risk assessments and analytical reviews

• Advanced reconciliation and financial statement review skills

• Ability to lead month-end and year-end close

• Ability to independently prepare and review audit schedules



Systems Requirements

• QuickBooks Online (mandatory)

• Advanced Excel skills (required)



Compensation & Benefits

• Competitive salary (based on experience)

• Flexible work hours

• Professional development support (CE credits, licensing fees, etc.)

• Performance bonuses



How to Apply

Submit your resume, cover letter, and proof of CPA license to 
 or

title: Shopify Supplier Operations Coordinator (Dropshipping / Fulfillment)
description:
We operate and scale multiple fashion ecommerce dropshipping brands on Shopify, promoted organically on TikTok.



Our business is growing, and we are looking for someone reliable and structured who can help manage daily supplier operations and fulfillment coordination.



This role focuses heavily on working with multiple Chinese suppliers, ensuring orders are fulfilled correctly, invoices are accurate, and operational issues are resolved quickly.



This is a hands-on operational role, not a strategy role.



Main Responsibilities



Supplier Operations & Fulfillment



-Communicate daily with multiple Chinese suppliers

-Send daily fulfillment instructions (order lists)

-Ensure orders are processed and shipped on time

-Make sure tracking numbers are added correctly in Shopify

-Follow up with suppliers when responses are slow

-Solve operational problems related to sizes, stock, or product quality



Invoice Verification



-Request supplier invoices daily

-Carefully verify invoices line by line

-Identify errors or inconsistencies

-Resolve discrepancies with suppliers



Disputes & Chargebacks



-Respond to PayPal or card disputes

-Prepare evidence and documentation

-Communicate with customers when needed

-Help reduce dispute rates over time



Trustpilot & Reputation



-Monitor Trustpilot reviews

-Respond professionally to negative reviews

-Help resolve customer complaints

-Work toward turning negative reviews into updated or removed reviews



Operational Tracking



-Maintain operational Google Sheets

-Track supplier performance

-Update daily finance tracking sheets



Requirements



-Experience communicating with suppliers

-Experience in ecommerce operations or dropshipping

-Strong attention to detail

-Comfortable working with Google Sheets

-Strong written English

-Organized and consistent



Bonus



-Fashion ecommerce experience



Salary



-$6 per hour

-Long-term remote role

-Opportunity to grow into a larger operations leadership role as we expand



HOW TO APPLY (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)



To apply, please follow these steps:



1) Change your application subject to: “I want to improve your operations S”



2) Short Written Introduction (4–6 sentences)



Briefly explain:



-Your ecommerce experience

-Your experience working with suppliers or fulfillment



3) Send your CV



4) Send a Loom video (3–5 minutes)



In your Loom, please answer the following:



Scenario 1 — Supplier Problem



A supplier tells you after an order has been placed that the customer’s ordered size is not available.



Example:

The customer ordered Size S, but the supplier says the factory only has Chinese sizes from M to XXL.



Explain:



-How you would communicate with the supplier

-How you would handle the situation with the customer

-What steps you would take to prevent this problem from happening again

-What changes you would make to the product page or supplier process



Scenario 2 — Payment Dispute



A customer opens a payment dispute claiming they never received their order, but tracking shows the package is still in transit.



How would you handle this situation?



Explain:



-What steps you take

-What evidence you provide

-How you communicate with the payment processor



Scenario 3 — Trustpilot Review



A customer leaves a 1-star Trustpilot review saying their order is late and the brand is a scam.



Explain:



-How you would respond publicly

-How you would resolve the issue

-What steps you would take to encourage the customer to update or remove the review.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Time Graphic & Web Designer
description:
JOB TITLE: Full-Time Graphic & Web Designer (Elementor Preferred)



SHIFT: Night Shift (Philippines Time)

HOURS: 40 Hours per Week (Mon-Fri)

SALARY: $400 USD per Month during the probationary period (will increase based on performance)



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a US-based digital marketing agency looking for a creative Full-Time Tea
mber to join our design department.



We need someone to handle our Graphic Design needs (both Print and Digital) as well as Website Design. You must be comfortable working with WordPress, preferably with Elementor.



We highly prefer someone who can work comfortably and efficiently with Canva for day-to-day digital assets, but you MUST still be fully proficient with Adobe software (like Photoshop and Illustrator) for more complex design work.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



-- GRAPHIC DESIGN (PRINT & DIGITAL)

You will handle all visual assets. This includes designing Print materials (flyers, menus, brochures with correct CMYK/bleeds) AND Digital assets (social media posts, ad banners, thumbnails) using a mix of Canva and Adobe software.



-- WEBSITE DESIGN

You will design and update responsive website pages and landing pages using WordPress and Elementor.



-- BRANDING

Ensure all designs match our brand guidelines.



REQUIREMENTS



Proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator (Mandatory), while also being highly comfortable working in Canva for design planning, presentation and collaborative works, and quicker tasks.



Proven experience in Graphic Design and Website Design (WordPress/Elementor).



Reliable PC and Internet capable of running heavy design software smoothly.



HOW TO APPLY



IMPORTANT: We will not review applications without a Portfolio.



Please send a message with the Subject Line: "Designer Application" and answer these questions:



How many years of design experience do you have?



How comfortable are you with building websites using WordPress and Elementor?



Are you comfortable and fast working within Canva for daily design tasks, while still being proficient in Photoshop/Illustrator?



Are you okay with the starting salary of $400 USD/month for the probationary period?



Are you able to work the Night Shift (Philippines Time)?



LINK TO PORTFOLIO: (Must include Print, Digital, and Website Design samples).

title: Systems & IT Operations Manager
description:
We are a U.S.-based strategic communications and marketing agency serving clients in public health, government, education, and social impact sectors. Our work involves complex projects, multiple systems, and strict data security requirements.



We are seeking a Systems & IT Operations Manager to own and manage the company’s technology environment including systems, apps, equipment, and websites. This role is responsible for administering company systems, maintaining security, supporting staff with technical issues, and ensuring our tools and infrastructure run smoothly.



This is not a basic help desk role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically about systems, security, and operational efficiency. This role also includes data entry and support with data collection roles as needed for active client projects. 

 

Key Responsibilities



Systems Administration

Manage accounts, access, and configurations across company systems, including:

• Google Workspace / Google Admin

• Asana

• Apple 

• Slack

• Zoom

• Microsoft 365 & Microsoft Teams

• Adobe

• Gusto 

• Stipe

• SquareSpace

• GoDaddy

• MailChimp

• Whova

• IBM SPSS

• Google Drive and cloud storage systems

• Additional tools used by the agency

Responsibilities include:

• Creating and managing user accounts

• Access permissions and role management

• System configuration and maintenance

• Monitoring system updates and new features

 

Identity & Access Management

• Implement and maintain secure authentication protocols

• Manage role-based access permissions

• Conduct periodic access audits

• Maintain Single Sign-On (SSO) where applicable

• Enforce company password management policies and tools

 

Security & Data Protection

• Maintain cybersecurity best practices across all systems

• Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA)

• Monitor security alerts and suspicious activity

• Maintain data protection standards for sensitive client and company information

• Assist in i
 response if security issues arise

 

Backup & Disaster Recovery

• Maintain data backup protocols

• Ensure company data is backed up and recoverable

• Periodically test restoration procedures

• Maintain documentation of disaster recovery plans

 

Equipment & Device Management

• Maintain inventory of all company laptops and technology equipment

• Register and track device updates and warranties

• Order equipment as needed for new employees

• Manage onboarding and offboarding technology setup

• Support remote employees with device troubleshooting

 

Technical Support

• Provide troubleshooting support for employees experiencing technical issues

• Assist staff with system setup and best practices

• Maintain documentation and guides for internal systems

 

Vendor & License Management

• Track software licenses and seat utilization

• Manage renewals and vendor relationships

• Monitor software costs and identify opportunities to reduce expenses

• Negotiate pricing when appropriate

 

Workflow Optimization & Automation

• Identify opportunities to improve workflows across systems

• Recommend and implement integrations or automation tools where appropriate

• Maintain efficient system architecture as the company grows

 

Data & Research Support

Support internal research and analytics projects by:

• Assisting with survey administration and online data collection

• Organizing incoming data

• Performing data entry and data cleaning when needed

• Supporting research teams with tools such as SPSS or survey platforms

 

File & Digital Systems Organization

• Maintain a clear and structured company file system

• Ensure files are organized, accessible, and properly labeled

• Manage access permissions across shared drives

• Periodically review and improve file structures

 

Documentation & Training

• Maintain documentation of all company systems and workflows

• Stay informed about new tools and best practices

• Conduct occasional internal trainings to help staff use systems effectively

Website Management (Squarespace)

• Maintain and update the company website using the Squarespace CMS

• Publish new content including pages, blog posts, team updates, and announcements

• Implement basic site configuration and layout adjustments as needed

• Ensure website functionality, forms, and integrations remain operational

• Coordinate updates to images, copy, and page structure based on internal requests

• Monitor site performance and identify opportunities for improvement

• Maintain organized backups of website content and assets

• Perform routine maintenance and updates to ensure the website remains secure and up to date

 

Required Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, IT, or related field

• 5+ years experience managing SaaS systems and cloud tools

• Strong experience with Google Workspace administration

• Experience managing multiple SaaS platforms in a business environment

• Experience with user access management and permissions

• Strong understanding of cybersecurity best practices

• Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

• Strong written and spoken English communication

• Experience supporting remote teams

 

Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience managing systems for a service-based business or agency

• Experience with Asana administration

• Experience with data management or research tools (SPSS, surveys, analytics)

• Experience implementing automation or integrations

• Experience managing distributed or international teams

 

Work Structure

• Remote (Philippines-based)

• Full-time, long-term role

• Must overlap at least 4 hours daily with U.S. Pacific Time

• Stable internet connection required

title: Executive Business Development Manager
description:
Company Overview

We support a high-end consulting and advisory firm that works directly with founders and executive teams at large, complex organizations. The business delivers strategic engagements around operations, culture, and leadership, typically serving companies in the hundreds of millions in revenue.

The firm is founder-led, relationship-driven, and known for deep, trusted advisory work rather than transactional consulting. The next phase of growth requires building a more repeatable, thoughtful sales motion without losing the personal, high-touch approach that defines the brand.



Role Overview

This is not a traditional sales or SDR role.

The Executive Relationship Manager works directly under Scott to support a small number of high-value client relationships and opportunities. The role exists to extend founder-led sales efforts, ensure warm opportunities are nurtured properly, and create continuity between marketing interest and executive-level sales conversations.

Success in this role comes from precision, discretion, and follow-through, not volume.

You will manage a limited number of carefully selected accounts, pay close attention to context and timing, and help move conversations forward in a way that feels personal, thoughtful, and aligned with senior executive expectations.

This role may support one primary client initially, with the opportunity to support a second similar client over time.



Core Responsibilities

Relationship Management & Follow-Up

Manage a small portfolio of high-priority target accounts

Maintain detailed context on relationships, prior conversations, and internal notes

Ensure warm opportunities never go cold due to lack of follow-up



Thoughtful Outreach & Communication

Draft and send highly personalized outreach
s or messages

Reference context, prior touchpoints, and known relationships

Communicate in a professional, discreet, executive-appropriate tone



Sales Support & Coordination

Prepare Scott with background and context before meetings

Handle post-meeting follow-up and next-step coordination

Keep 
ntum moving between conversations



Signal Tracking & Prioritization

Monitor warm signals such as website engagement, inbound interest, or referrals

Identify when outreach is timely and relevant

Surface priority opportunities to Scott with clear context



Systems & Organization

Keep CRM or tracking systems clean and accurate

Document relationship status and next actions clearly

Provide visibility into active conversations without unnecessary noise



Nice-to-Have / Expansion Responsibilities

These are not required on day one, but may become part of the role over time:

Provide feedback on messaging or conversion gaps based on conversations

Conduct light research on executives or target accounts

Support similar relationship-driven sales motions for an additional client

Participate in incentive or bounty structures tied to qualified meetings or closed deals



Ideal Candidate Profile

This role is a strong fit for someone who:

Has experience supporting senior leaders, executives, or high-touch clients

Comes from an executive assistant, consulting support, hospitality, PR, or client services background

Enjoys managing a small number of important relationships deeply

Is highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Communicates clearly and professionally in writing

Does not want a high-volume sales or cold outreach role

title: Media Buyer (UK-Based)
description:
Do you have experience designing engaging and high-converting ads?

Do you have experience creating and implementing the entire marketing funnel?

Do you have experience setting up, managing, and optimizing campaigns?



If you can confidently answer YES to all three questions, this job is for you!



Position: Media Buyer

Salary: Up to $10 per hour

Job Type: Project-based, Part-time positio

Working Hours: Flexible



Your main responsibilities will be to:



Campaign Strategy & Management

- Set up,  manage and improve campaigns

- Identify key audience segments and implement precise targeting strategies

- Monitor campaign performance and adjust budgets, creatives, and placements

- Create and implement the whole funnel 



Creative & Content Collaboration

- Design engaging and highly converting ads

- Work with the content team to ensure ads align with brand tone and objectives

- Test different ad creatives, formats, and copy for best performance



Analytics & Reporting

- Track key metrics such as CTR, CPC, conversions, and ROI

- Provide clear reports and recommendations to improve results



You MUST:

- Be analytical and results-driven with strong attention to detail

- Communicate clearly and effectively with tea
mbers

- Be proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently

- Demonstrate reliability in meeting deadlines and managing priorities



Must-have qualifications:



- Experience in designing engaging and highly converting ads

- Experience in creating and implementing the whole funnel 

- Experience in setting up,  managing and improving campaigns

- Strong hands-on experience with
 Ads Manager 

- Good English Communication Skills

- Skilled in audience targeting, A/B testing, and ad optimization

- Ability to analyze campaign data and translate it into actionable insights



Additional, nice-to-have qualifications:



- Experience with Linkedin Ads 

- Experience promoting ads in the UK and US markets

- Knowledge of retargeting and custom audience strategies

- Understanding of conversion tracking and attribution models

- Exposure to CRM or marketing automation tools (e.g., GHL, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar)



Kindly include the link to your Resume and Portfolio/Sample Works in your application.

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Company

We are  small business bookkeeping firm based in Florida, USA. Our mission is to unlock financial clarity and peace of mind for small business owners. 



We are hiring a full-time, long-term Accounting Manager to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for an advanced accounting professional who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple client engagements while taking ownership of key accounting responsibilities.



Position Type

Long-term, full-time independent contractor role

First 60 days serve as a paid probationary period

Compensation & Benefits

$1,450 USD per month

Salary paid monthly via Wise (direct bank transfer)

Annual performance bonus

12 Paid Time Off (PTO) days

5 Paid Sick Days

US Holiday calendar observed



Work Schedule (Philippines Time)

This role follows a split-shift schedule to allow real-time collaboration with our US-based team while providing independent production time.



8:00 PM – 1:00 AM Manila

12:00 PM – 3:00 PM Manila



(8 working hours per day total)

Applicants must be comfortable with a split-shift schedule.



Exclusivity Requirement

This is a dedicated full-time position.

Due to confidentiality and workload requirements, applicants must not hold other full-time positions unless disclosed and approved.



Role Overview

The Accounting Manager will be responsible for managing a portfolio of approximately 15 clients and ensuring the accuracy, timeliness, and quality of all bookkeeping and month-end close processes. 



This role emphasizes ownership, organization, and task management. You will oversee client accounting workflows, ensure deadlines are met, and maintain high-quality financial reporting standards for each assigned client.



Key Responsibilities

Manage entire accounting cycle for 15 or more client accounts



Own the full monthly close process for assigned clients



Perform and review bank and credit card reconciliations



Maintain accurate transaction categorization in QuickBooks Online



Prepare monthly financial statements (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)



Identify inconsistencies, errors, or unusual activity in financial reports



Prepare and post adjusting journal entries during month-end close



Ensure all assigned client work is completed accurately and on schedule



Manage accounting tasks and maintain organized client workflows



Communicate regularly with the Lead Accountant regarding client status



Work with QuickBooks Online integrations such as 
, Keeper, and similar financial workflow software



Requirements

Advanced QuickBooks Online experience



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting



Strong understanding of debits, credits, reconciliations, and month-end close procedures



3+ years bookkeeping or accounting experience



Ability to manage multiple clients and prioritize tasks effectively



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Reliable computer with fast internet connection



Quiet workspace for meetings and focused work



Strong written and verbal English communication



Application Requirement

To confirm you have read the full posting, please include the following line in your application:



“I confirm I am an advanced QB user and I am aware of the exclusivity rules.”



Applications without this line will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us

Stable, long-term role



Small, close-knit team



Clear workflows and structured processes



Exposure to a variety of industries and US accounting practices



Split-shift schedule that avoids full overnight work



Team investment in your knowledge and professional growth

Charlotte Party Rentals is a growing corporate event infrastructure company based in Charlotte, North Carolina.



We specialize in:

• tent installations

• corporate event setups

• large-scale event builds

Responsibilities include:

• Manage social media accounts (Instagram,

• Upload photos and videos from installs

Skills Required

TENT

Applications without this word may not be reviewed.

If you had one photo of a corporate tent installation, what three social media posts would you create from it?

title: Meta Ads Lead Generation Expert – Remote – Up to $3,000/month
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Meta Ads Media Buyer to join our growing lead generation agency.



At Guidsagency we run high-performing Meta advertising campaigns for construction and home-service companies in the Netherlands.



The goal is simple:



Generate high-quality leads that convert into real customers.



This is not an entry-level role.



We are specifically looking for someone with real hands-on experience running Meta Ads campaigns, preferably within lead generation.



If you understand how to analyze performance, test creatives, and scale campaigns, this role could be a great fit.



About The Role



As a Media Buyer, you will manage and optimize 30–40 Meta Ads accounts for our clients.



Your job is to keep campaigns stable, profitable, and continuously improving.



You will monitor performance daily, test new creative concepts, and identify opportunities to improve results across multiple accounts.



This role requires someone who can:



• Think analytically

• Work independently

• Diagnose problems quickly

• Continuously test and improve campaigns



You will work closely with our internal team while maintaining full ownership of campaign performance.



What You Will Be Doing



• Managing and optimizing Meta Ads campaigns for lead generation clients

• Monitoring campaign performance daily

• Analyzing key metrics such as:



Cost per lead (CPL)

Campaign stability

Creative performance

• Testing new ad creatives and identifying winning angles

• Diagnosing performance issues and implementing optimizations

• Managing multiple ad accounts while maintaining stable results



Our Clients

All of our clients operate in the construction and home-services industry in the Netherlands.



Examples include:



• Roofing companies

• Solar installation companies

• Window replacement companies

• Renovation contractors

• Bathroom renovation companies



The objective of every campaign is clear:



Generate qualified leads that turn into real customers.



Requirements



To qualify for this role you should have:



• Proven experience running Meta Ads campaigns

• Experience with lead generation campaigns

• Strong understanding of campaign structure and optimization

• Experience managing multiple ad accounts simultaneously

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• The ability to diagnose performance changes quickly



You should be comfortable working with campaign data and making decisions based on numbers.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is creative, analytical, and highly independent.



The ideal candidate:



• Is highly creative with ad concepts, hooks, and messaging

• Understands how to test and identify winning ad angles

• Can analyze campaign performance and react quickly

• Is organized when managing multiple accounts

• Can work without constant supervision



We are not looking for someone who needs instructions for every small change.



We are looking for someone who:



• Takes ownership of their work

• Solves problems independently

• Continuously improves campaigns

• Enjoys testing and optimizing ads



Working Environment



This is a remote position.



Our team operates within the Amsterdam / Central European Time zone (CET).

Because our clients are based in the Netherlands, you must be comfortable working within this time zone.



Compensation



Compensation depends on experience and performance.

Media buyers in this role can earn up to $3,000 per month or more depending on experience and results.



This role also offers long-term growth opportunities as our agency continues to scale.



Hiring Process



Our hiring process consists of three steps:



Application Form

Interview Call

Practical Skill Test



We carefully review every candidate to ensure we hire experienced media buyers who understand performance marketing and lead generation.



Apply Here



If you believe you are a strong fit for this role and have real experience running Meta Ads campaigns, please complete our application form below.



Apply here:




Please take your time when completing the form.

title: Virtual Assistant & Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve/Premiere)
description:
We are a creative marketing agency seeking a resourceful Virtual Assistant with strong video editing skills using DaVinci Resolve (preferred) or Adobe Premiere Pro. You should have the ability to edit and create engaging short-form content to a good standard (around 7–8/10 skill level, with 10 being elite). The ideal candidate is organised, proactive and adept at juggling administrative support tasks while delivering polished video content.



Key responsibilities include:

• Producing and editing high-quality short-form videos for social media using DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro, and collaborating on creative concepts.

• Maintaining and organising our Notion workspace; assigning tasks and keeping project boards current.

• Managing calendars, sending reminders before meetings, and following up afterwards to capture action items.

• Leveraging AI tools to streamline workflows and assist with tasks such as transcription or summarisation.

• Acting as a point of contact for day-to-day tasks, ensuring timely communication and clear priorities.



Qualifications:

• Proficient with DaVinci Resolve and/or Adobe Premiere Pro, with knowledge of transitions, effects and colour grading.

• Experience editing engaging social media videos.

• Strong organisational and communication skills; ability to manage multiple priorities with attention to detail.

• Familiarity with productivity tools such as Notion, calendar management, and AI applications.

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely during Australian hours (AEST).



Please include the word pineapple at the beginning of your application so we know you read the full job description.

Also include a link to one short-form video you edited that you are most proud of.

title: (1) Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)
description:
OB TITLE:

Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that works with service-based businesses (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.), primarily in the US market. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can create scroll-stopping content across multiple formats.



You'll be our go-to creative person — editing short-form videos for social media, producing ad creatives for Meta and Google campaigns, and designing graphics for our clients' brands. You'll also work with AI tools like HeyGen and ElevenLabs to produce AI-generated video and voiceover content.



This isn't a "just cut clips together" role. You'll be creating content that directly drives leads and sales for real businesses, so you need to understand what makes people stop scrolling, click, and take action.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) — fast-paced, hook-driven, optimized for engagement

-Create video ads for Meta and Google campaigns (direct response style)

-Produce client deliverables such as testimonial videos, promo videos, and brand content

-Use AI video/voice tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs) to create and enhance content

-Design static graphics — social media posts, ad creatives, thumbnails, banners

-Collaborate with our team on content strategy and creative direction

-Maintain consistent quality and meet turnaround deadlines



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 2 years of experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-Strong graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum; Photoshop/Illustrator is a plus)

-Experience editing short-form, direct-response, or social media content (not just vlogs or cinematic edits)

-Familiarity with AI content tools — HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar platforms

-Good eye for typography, color, and layout

-Understands hooks, pacing, and what performs well on social platforms

-Reliable internet connection and able to work during reasonable overlap hours

-Can manage multiple projects and hit deadlines without constant follow-up



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience designing or building landing pages (using tools like GoHighLevel, WordPress, Unbounce, or similar)

-Background working in or with a digital marketing agency

-Basic understanding of paid ads and what makes a creative convert

-Motion graphics or animation skills



COMPENSATION:

-Full-time position

-Salary is open and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

-Long-term role with room to grow as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY:



Important: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Creative" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:



-A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

-Links to your portfolio or samples of your work (video edits, graphics, landing pages if applicable)

-Which AI tools you've used and how you've used them

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start



We review every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Revenue Cycle Analyst
description:
The Revenue Cycle Analyst will have at least 5 years of experience dealing with all types of payers including Medicare, Medicare Advantage, Medicaid, and Commercial medical billing. This position requires knowledge of the entire revenue cycle from charges, medical necessity, EOBS, HCFA's, denials, ERAs, clearinghouses, eligibility, payor enrollment, and billing system configuration settings.



Responsibilities:

- Experience in laboratory/diagnostic billing

- Assist in implementing, updating and maintaining billing system configurations and act as liaison with the billing software team (Imagine)

- Oversight of entire full cycle revenue management

- Management of follow up queues and client interactions

- Responsible for overseeing and improving cash cycle

- Assist with external initiated audits

- Manage monthly patient statements and act as liaison between the billing department and collection company

- Generate revenue cycle reports and analytics used to monitor and optimize revenue cycle billing metrics and cash flow targets.

- Produce dashboards, reports and other tools to support management oversight.

- Supervise all aspects of client billing process. Act as liaison between facilities and billing department

- Supervise and monitor posting of EOBs

- Management of fee schedules

- Other duties as directed



Minimum Qualifications:

- High school diploma required

- 5+ experience in medical billing (diagnostics or ancillary services preferred)

- Coding certification from AHIMA or AAPC highly preferred; CPC preferred

- Prior experience utilizing a PBX or digital multi-line phone system required

Operations

Basic HTML and CSS for Shopify customization

Strong Photoshop skills

Understanding of ecommerce workflows and product setup

Experience sourcing suppliers using Alibaba or similar platforms



You should also be:

Comfortable working independently

Proactive and solution focused

Photoshop work examples

A short explanation of your role in those projects



Applications without portfolios or examples will not be responded to.

We value high standards and strong work ethic and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with the brand long term.

title: Finance & Accounts Admin Virtual Assistant
description:
WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US…

We are a UK-based property development and investment group managing multiple property companies, SPVs and operational businesses. We require a highly organised, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage recurring finance admin tasks across approximately 12 companies.



THE ROLE WE ARE HIRING FOR

This is an execution and coordination role — not strategic accounting — focused on monthly reporting, bank reconciliations, CSV & PDF statement extraction, liaising with accountants, managing year-end submissions, organising financial documentation and processing scheduled payments.

Core Responsibilities

1. Monthly Financial Reporting

• Download monthly bank statements (CSV & PDF) for all companies

• Categorise income and expenditure (Xero / QuickBooks / spreadsheets)

• Produce simple monthly reporting (Income, Expenditure, Net Position, Variance vs previous month)

• Highlight unusual transactions

• Flag cash flow risks

Deliverable: Clean monthly summary report per company

2. Accountant Coordination

• Gather all required year-end documents

• Respond to accountant queries

• Submit requested CSV files, invoices and documents

• Track submission deadlines

• Maintain compliance calendar (Companies House & HMRC)

3. Bank & Finance Administration

• Download statements monthly (CSV + PDF)

• Upload to organised shared drive structure

• Prepare payment schedules for approval

• Manage outgoing payments (with approval)

4. Data & Systems Management

• Maintain organised Google Drive / Dropbox structure

• Ensure naming consistency

• Maintain master spreadsheet for all companies, VAT quarters and year-end deadlines

• Create simple dashboards 

Required Skills

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets ability

• Comfortable working with CSV files

• Experience with Xero or QuickBooks preferred

• Extremely organised with high attention to detail

• Good written English

• Proactive communicator

Experience Required

• 2+ years working as an Accounts Admin VA or Bookkeeping Assistant

• Experience supporting UK-based businesses preferred

• Basic understanding of P&L, cash flow, VAT and year-end filing process

• No formal accounting qualification required

• This is an operational execution role, not strategic accounting

KPIs

• All monthly reports delivered by 5th of each month

• 100% compliance deadlines met

• Zero missed filings

• Clean document management

• Reduced Director involvement in finance admin by 90%

Personality Fit

• Likes repetitive structured tasks

• Enjoys admin precision

• Dependable and steady

• Can work independently without drama

• Ambitious enough to eventually take ownership of finance administration across all companies





THE IMPORTANCE OF THIS ROLE

This role is critical in ensuring financial clarity, compliance and operational smoothness across our portfolio.



WHY WE’RE A GREAT PLACE TO WORK

We are a new and exciting, fast growing company in the property industry. We have built a sizable portfolio in the Midlands area, UK, which is due to triple in growth in the next year. We have immense vision and passion in our field, creating new business models to test in the UK. We are passionate about the service we offer to our tenants and care deeply about the people in the business, whether that be professionals, staff or tenants.



THE VALUES WE STAND BY

We want to make a difference to people’s lives. Sana means healing and it is that self nourishment we want to offer anyone who is involved with us. We believe the greatest legacy you can leave behind, is the amount of lives you positively impact.

We are built on a foundation of strong ethics and morals. We respect others and are truly grateful for the people who offer a significant contribution to our business success. Our goal is to build a strong cohesive team with initiative which is self managing, operating in a fantastic company culture and community.



PAY AND HOURS

The starting rate for this role will be: £5 per hour

This position is available ASAP

This is a Long Term permanent role

Provisional Schedule: Part-Time Remote

You will be available for at least: (10–20 hours per week)

We will pay you Monthly



Other benefits:

We offer end of year bonus as standard (13 months pay pro rata)





NOW THE IMPORTANT PART - HOW YOU CAN APPLY:

If this role sounds perfect for you then we’d love to hear from you!

Please read this next part carefully so your application isn’t rejected!!!

Please send me an
 to 
 to let me know you are interested. Make sure that the subject of your
 is "Finance & Accounts Admin Virtual Assistant" This lets me know you have actually read this job posting and aren’t just copy and pasting your application to loads of jobs.

We want someone who is serious about this role and this is a great way for us to see who is paying attention to the details :)

Once we’ve received your message we’ll request any further information as needed.

I look forward to hearing from you.



Georgina Sophia Simmons

The iLiving Group

title: Remote Personal Chief of Staff / Senior Personal PA / Life Operations Manager
description:
I am a busy UK CEO looking for a highly capable, proactive, and discreet remote personal PA / life operations manager to take ownership of my personal admin and household coordination in the UK.



This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who can think ahead, use judgment, follow through properly, and keep my personal world organised without needing constant supervision.



The role is remote, but the work is focused on arranging and managing day-to-day life in the UK.



Main responsibilities include:



Managing personal diary, reminders, appointments, and scheduling



Booking flights, hotels, travel, restaurants, and reservations



Arranging and managing household staff and services in the UK, including cleaners, housekeepers, tradespeople, repairs, and maintenance



Coordinating day-to-day household matters and making sure standards are maintained



Handling household administration such as insurance renewals, utilities, service bookings, deliveries, and general home-related organisation



Booking and managing practical matters such as car servicing, MOTs, repairs, collections, and similar tasks



Keeping track of bills, direct debits, renewals, and important dates, and ensuring nothing important is missed



Researching options, obtaining quotes, and presenting clear recommendations



Ordering groceries, household supplies, and other essentials online where needed



Keeping a master list of outstanding tasks and driving them through to completion



Providing clear daily updates and weekly planning summaries



What I need:



Excellent written and spoken English



Strong experience supporting a founder, executive, or high-responsibility individual



Highly organised, detail-focused, and calm under pressure



Proactive and resourceful, with strong follow-through



Able to manage multiple moving parts without being chased



Good judgment, discretion, and professionalism



Comfortable working with UK-based suppliers, staff, and service providers



Able to overlap with UK working hours



This role would suit someone who is naturally organised, takes ownership, solves problems independently, and is very strong at keeping life running smoothly behind the scenes.



To apply, please send:



A short introduction about yourself



Details of similar work you have done



A sample daily update you would send in this role



A brief explanation of how you would manage multiple household and life-admin tasks without things being missed



Your available working hours and your preferred monthly rate



This is a long-term role for the right person.



For an even stronger version, make the first line of the ad title:



Remote Personal PA / Life Operations Manager for UK CEO



And for the pay field, I’d use:



$1,200-$1,800/month depending on experience and fit

title: Email Marketing Specialist
description:
You know you’re better than your current role. You know the platform could do more. You know the DNS is probably misconfigured. You know the segmentation is lazy and the CTOR could be twice what it is. But nobody listens, nobody gives you the authority, and nobody even understands what deliverability means. You’re treated as a send-button operator when you should be running the engine room.



That ends here.



At BusinessRiver, we manage 40+ professional communities and 35+ sector news sites across Ireland and the UK, reaching 180,000+ senior decision-makers.
 is how we engage and activate those audiences — and we send a lot of it, across a lot of domains. We’re hiring an
 Marketing Specialist to own the entire performance operation. Not the copy — our content team handles that. The performance. Deliverability, platform optimisation, segmentation architecture, automation workflows, A/B testing, CTOR improvement, GDPR compliance, DNS health, sender reputation. All of it. Across every community.



 marketing has always been a discipline that embraces automation — and AI is the next exciting chapter of that journey. We’re rapidly building our AI-enhanced marketing capability, and we want someone who’s ready to explore what’s now possible: smarter testing, faster analysis, predictive segmentation, and optimisation at a scale that wasn’t achievable even a year ago. This isn’t about replacing what you do — it’s about giving you more powerful tools to do it with. We’ll train and support you every step of the way.



What You’ll Get

• Real ownership — you run the
 performance engine, with the authority and accountability to match

• An in-house team of developers, analysts, and marketing specialists working alongside you from day one

• Structured training in AI-enhanced marketing tools — the next evolution of your discipline, and we’ll help you master it

• Direct collaboration with platform deliverability specialists as part of an active optimisation programme

• Rapid career progression for the right person — this is your starting point, not your ceiling

• A 17-year-old company in growth mode, with a clear path from specialist to senior to team lead and beyond



What We Need

• 2–4 years of hands-on
 marketing with a clear focus on performance, deliverability, and platform optimisation

• Proven experience operating a marketing automation platform at scale (Force24, HubSpot,

Marketo, or similar)

• Strong understanding of deliverability: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, sender reputation, inbox placement, bounce management

• Track record of improving key
 metrics (CTOR, deliverability rates, engagement) with supporting data

• Experience using AI tools in a professional marketing context — or genuine enthusiasm to learn

• Working knowledge of GDPR compliance in
 marketing

• Comfortable working with developers on DNS configuration, tracking, and platform integrations



You’ve been waiting for a role where someone actually lets you do what you’re capable of — with a real team behind you and a career path ahead. This is it.



To apply, submit your CV to 
  and 
 and a brief covering note. A full job specification will be sent to all applicants. We’re particularly interested in examples of how you’ve improved
 performance metrics in previous roles.
