title: Content Operations Manager (Video Essay Channel)
description:
We are looking for a Content Operations Manager to run the full production pipeline for long-form documentary / essay-style videos. Our creator has around 10 million subscribers and is launching a new channel and requires this assistance.



Your role is to manage the entire process from idea to final upload.



The creator will focus on recording and final approvals, while you ensure the entire production pipeline runs smoothly.



This role is ideal for someone who understands storytelling, research, and audience retention and enjoys managing creative teams.



Responsibilities

1. Ideas & Planning



Find strong documentary / essay topics with engaging angles

Maintain an idea bank and help plan weekly/monthly releases

Outline the story structure before scripting (what happens, in what order, and why it’s interesting)



2. Script & Research



Write scripts or hire/manage writers

Gather reliable sources and references

Maintain a simple “claims + sources” document for each project

Ensure all major claims are accurate and supported



3. Packaging (Titles & Thumbnails)



Propose 3–5 title options for each video

Suggest 2–3 thumbnail directions

Hire/manage thumbnail artists if needed

Finalize the best title + thumbnail combination before publishing

Monitor performance and recommend improvements if changes are needed after release



4. Editing & Quality Control



Manage editors and provide clear revision notes

Ensure strong pacing and engaging storytelling (strong hook, no slow sections)

Verify footage usage is correct and there are no factual or narrative gaps



5. Systems & Operations



Keep projects organized

Track files, deadlines, and versions

Build simple SOPs and checklists so the production process runs smoothly and can scale



Requirements



Experience working with documentary or essay-style video content

Strong research and storytelling ability

Experience managing writers, editors, or creative teams

Ability to organize projects and keep production on schedule

Strong attention to detail



Nice to Have

Experience with thumbnails, titles, or video packaging

Experience managing remote creative teams

Familiarity with audience retention and storytelling pacing



Work Details

Remote position

Flexible schedule

20–30 hours per week initially (can grow over time)



Application Instructions



Please include the following in your application:



Portfolio or examples of documentary / essay style content you’ve worked on

A short explanation of your role in those projects

A brief example of a topic idea you would turn into a video essay

Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

If you're passionate about storytelling and want to help build a high-quality documentary channel, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Affiliate Program Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a fast-growing peptide company seeking a driven, articulate, and creative Affiliate Program Manager to lead and grow our affiliate network. This is a high-impact, relationship-facing role that sits at the intersection of communication, strategy, and brand partnership. You will serve as the primary point of contact for our affiliate partners, own the day-to-day operations of the program, and collaborate directly with ownership to scale results.

This role rewards initiative. You will have the freedom to bring fresh ideas, test new approaches, and help shape the affiliate channel into a major growth engine for the company.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Affiliate Relations & Communication

• Serve as the dedicated point of contact for all affiliate partners

• Host regular Zoom calls with affiliates to onboard, support, review performance, and share updates

• Respond promptly to affiliate inquiries, troubleshoot issues, and maintain strong ongoing relationships

• Provide affiliates with the tools, creative assets, and guidance they need to succeed

Program Management & Strategy

• Oversee and manage the full affiliate program including tracking, links, payouts, and reporting

• Recruit and onboard new affiliate partners aligned with our brand and target audience

• Monitor program performance metrics and proactively identify opportunities to improve conversion and growth

• Escalate key decisions, performance concerns, and strategic opportunities to ownership with clear context and recommendations

Creative & Growth Initiatives

• Bring original ideas to develop affiliate campaigns, promotions, and incentive structures

• Collaborate with the marketing team on content, landing pages, and materials to support affiliate success

• Explore new partnership opportunities and affiliate channels to expand program reach

• Test and iterate on program structures, commission tiers, and bonus incentives to maximize performance

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Excellent verbal and written English communication skills with minimal accent — you will be the voice of the brand on regular Zoom calls with partners

• Prior experience managing affiliate programs, influencer partnerships, or similar performance-based marketing channels

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build trust and maintain professional relationships remotely

• Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage multiple affiliate relationships simultaneously

• Creative problem-solver who takes ownership and is not afraid to try new things

• Comfortable using affiliate platforms, CRMs, tracking dashboards, and standard communication tools

• Background or genuine interest in the health, wellness, or peptide/supplement industry is a strong plus

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

We believe in rewarding performance. Compensation for this role is flexible and negotiable based on experience, and is structured to reflect the direct impact you have on the success of the affiliate program.

Component Details

Base Rate Negotiable — discussed during the interview process based on experience and availability

Performance Bonus Bonus pay tied to overall affiliate program performance (revenue growth, new partner acquisitions, retention)

Creative Bonus Additional incentives available for affiliate campaigns or initiatives that exceed benchmarks

Schedule Flexible hours; must be available for scheduled Zoom calls with affiliates and ownership

WHY JOIN US

• Be part of a growing company in the booming peptide and wellness industry

• High-autonomy role — your creativity and initiative are genuinely valued

• Direct access to ownership with a clear path to grow with the company

• Fully remote with flexible scheduling

• Performance-based compensation that rewards your results

HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit the following:

• Your resume or a brief overview of your relevant experience

• A short video or voice introduction (1–2 minutes) demonstrating your communication style and English proficiency

• A brief description of a past affiliate, partnership, or marketing initiative you managed and what results it produced

We look forward to meeting you.

title: Electrical Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Electrical Engineer to join our engineering team. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and overseeing the electrical wiring systems for our current product line. This role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure that our products meet high standards of quality, safety, and efficiency.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and Development:



Design and develop electrical systems and wiring diagrams for our products.

Ensure compatibility and integration of electrical systems with other product components.

Utilize CAD software for designing and simulating electrical circuits and systems.

Testing and Validation:



Conduct testing of electrical systems to ensure functionality, safety, and compliance with industry standards.

Analyze test data and make necessary adjustments to electrical designs.

Collaborate with the quality assurance team to validate and certify electrical designs.

Collaboration and Coordination:



Work closely with mechanical engineers, product designers, and other tea
mbers.

Coordinate with suppliers and vendors for electrical components.

Participate in project meetings and provide expert insights on electrical engineering matters.

Documentation and Reporting:



Prepare and maintain technical documentation including wiring schematics, system specifications, and project reports.

Ensure proper documentation for compliance with industry standards and regulations.

Continuous Improvement:



Stay updated with the latest trends and advancements in electrical engineering.

Propose and implement improvements in electrical systems for better performance and efficiency.

Participate in training and development programs.

Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field.

Minimum of [X years] of experience in electrical engineering, preferably in a product development environment.

Proficient in CAD software and electrical design tools.

Strong understanding of electrical engineering principles, standards, and regulations.

Experience in designing and testing electrical systems for consumer or industrial products.

Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

Strong communication and teamwork abilities.

Additional Requirements:

Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

Willingness to learn new technologies and methodologies.

Capability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Application Process:

Interested candidates should submit a resume, cover letter, and a portfolio (if applicable) detailing relevant experience and projects.

title: Senior Content Marketing Specialist
description:
Content marketing is facing a challenge. AI is taking a bigger role in how content is researched, created, and distributed. The tools are getting more powerful, the pace is getting faster, and if you’re a content marketer, you’d be forgiven for wondering where you fit into what comes next.



Here’s where you fit: right at the centre of it. This is your opportunity. At BusinessRiver, we’re not replacing content marketers with AI. We’re building a content team that uses AI to produce better work, faster, across more channels than was ever possible before. We manage 40+ professional communities and 35+ sector news sites reaching 180,000+ senior decision-makers across Ireland and the UK — covering everything from Built Environment to BioPharma, Sustainability to Professional Services.



We’re hiring a Senior Content Marketing Specialist to create and distribute high-quality, insight-driven content across our communities. You’ll work alongside editors,
 marketers, community managers, and commercial leads — turning complex sector topics into compelling stories that grow audiences and support our events, awards programmes, and partnerships.



You’ll be trained and supported to use AI as a creative accelerator — prompt engineering, AI-assisted research, content generation at scale. Join this team and you won’t just survive the changes happening in content marketing. You’ll be ahead of them, with new skills, a stronger career, and a team that’s invested in your growth.



What You’ll Get

• A dedicated in-house team of developers, analysts, and specialists working alongside you from day one

• Structured AI training and a shared playbook — we invest in building your capability, not just filling a seat

• Editorial freedom to create impactful content within a well-established brand and community framework

• Rapid career progression — this is a newly created role with a clear path to senior editorial and marketing leadership

• A 17-year-old company in growth mode, actively expanding its content, community, and AI capability



What We Need

• 2–3 years of content marketing, digital marketing, or editorial experience, ideally in B2B media, events, or professional communities

• Proven experience managing and growing B2B social media channels, particularly LinkedIn

• Exceptional writing, editing, and storytelling skills with a published portfolio

• Demonstrable experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) in a professional content context — or genuine enthusiasm to start

• Ability to research and write about complex sector topics for a senior professional audience

• Strong understanding of SEO principles and content optimisation

• Proactive, self-motivated, and commercially aware — you understand how content drives business outcomes



The content marketing landscape is changing. You can wait and see what happens — or you can join a team that’s already building what comes next, and grow with it.



To apply, submit your CV to 
 and 
 a brief covering note, and a portfolio of relevant published work. A full job specification will be sent to all applicants. We’d love to hear how you’ve been using AI in your content work — or how you’d like to start.

You will be calling businesses, building relationships, qualifying leads, and handing off opportunities to the closing team.



This is a home-based position. Candidates must have a quiet workspace, personal computer, stable high-speed internet (minimum 20 Mbps download/upload), and a noise-cancelling headset.



Key Responsibilities

• Make high-volume (
) outbound calls (cold and warm outreach) to qualify decision makers

• Follow up with leads consistently via phone,
, fax

• Maintain accurate notes, call logs, and pipeline updates in the CRM

• Perform other tasks as required by management



Qualifications

• University/college degree required

title: Experienced Sales Agents
description:

The company sells well-known branded products and not services.



This is a B2B role serving a US customer base, so you will be working North American business hours. This is a home-based position. Candidates must have a quiet workspace, personal computer, stable high-speed internet (minimum 50 Mbps download/upload), and a noise-cancelling headset.



Key Responsibilities

• Close inbound and SDR-qualified opportunities via phone,
, fax

Qualifications

• Excellent English communication skills (spoken, written, comprehension)

• Self-motivated and able to work independently in a target-driven environment

Compensation

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:

title: 3D CAD Designer for Internal 3D-Printed Tools and Fixtures (Project-Based, Long-Term)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based company looking for a skilled 3D CAD Designer to create functional, production-ready parts used internally by our team. These designs are not customer-facing products and are not for resale. They are practical tools that help our team work faster, safer, and more efficiently in day-to-day operations.



This is a project-based role with consistent weekly work for the right person.



Responsibilities

• Design 3D-printable parts for internal use such as tool holders, jigs, production fixtures, adapters, lids, brackets, and small mechanical components

• Convert rough sketches, written descriptions, measurements, or short concept videos into clean, printable 3D models

• Improve existing internal tools for better durability, strength, printability, and ergonomics

• Collaborate with our U.S. team to iterate designs quickly based on real-world testing

• Apply engineering fundamentals including tolerances, load considerations, and material behavior

• Deliver final STL and STEP files optimized for Bambu Lab printers (X1C, P1S, etc.)

• Suggest practical design improvements that streamline workflows and reduce manual effort



Requirements

• Strong experience with Fusion 360, SolidWorks, Onshape, or similar CAD software

• Ability to design functional mechanical parts, not just artistic or visual models

• Solid understanding of:



FDM printing tolerances



Material differences such as PLA, PETG, ABS, Nylon, and carbon fiber filaments



Mechanical strength and stress considerations

• Comfortable working from written descriptions, reference photos, measurements, or simple sketches

• Reliable communication and quick turnaround for revisions

• Strong attention to detail and willingness to refine designs based on feedback

• Practical, problem-solving mindset



Preferred Qualifications

• Background in mechanical engineering, product design, industrial design, or manufacturing technology

• Experience designing for FDM 3D printing, especially internal tooling

• Familiarity with Bambu Lab printers

• Experience designing jigs, fixtures, brackets, connectors, or similar functional parts

• Ability to create parametric models that are easy to adjust as needs change



What We Offer

• Steady project-based work with potential for long-term collaboration

• Remote work with flexible hours

• Clear direction and fast feedback

• The opportunity to design tools that directly improve internal operations

• A fair, respectful, and professional working relationship with a growing U.S. company



To Apply

Please complete the application form so we can review your profile:

title: E-commerce Content & Customer Support Manager
description:
Job Overview:

We are looking for a proactive and adaptable E-commerce Operations Manager to join our rapidly expanding online business. This role combines customer support and content management, requiring expertise in addressing customer inquiries, managing content across our e-commerce platform, and optimizing operational processes. You will work with platforms such as Shopify, Klaviyo, Gorgias, and AI-driven automation tools to maintain high standards, set KPIs, and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.

Customer Support Management:

-Address escalations from automated bots that need human intervention

-Respond quickly to customer inquiries regarding orders, shipping, and account issues through
 and chat

Content Management:

-Update product descriptions, images, and banners on the website

-Ensure all content adheres to brand guidelines and elevates the customer experience

-Design and update visual assets using Shopify and Photoshop



Operational Efficiency:

Platform Management:

Working Hours & Schedule:

We offer a flexible and supportive work environment where automation, AI, and innovation are central to achieving our objectives.

title: Looking For a professional Youtube Thumbnail Designer
description:
About Us



xTrades is a social trading platform. We help people learn how to trade and copy the trades of experienced traders. We have a growing 
 community and a content library that demands strong visuals to match our energy.



The Role



You will design thumbnails for our content across YouTube, 
, and other platforms. You know how to create visuals that stop the scroll and drive clicks. You have done this before, and you have the portfolio to prove it. This is not a learning role. We need someone who already understands what makes a great thumbnail and can deliver without heavy direction.



What You'll Do



You will design thumbnails for trading content, course launches, and community announcements. You will follow xTrades brand guidelines and match our visual tone. You will deliver files on time and iterate quickly based on feedback. This is an on-demand role — you work when we need you, and you are free the rest of the time.



What We're Looking For



You have a strong portfolio of thumbnails that convert. You are proficient in Photoshop, Canva, Figma, or similar tools. You understand composition, typography, and color. You turn around work quickly and communicate cleanly. You are self-driven and don't need to be managed closely.



Nice to Have



Experience designing for trading, crypto, or finance content. Familiarity with YouTube thumbnail best practices. A track record of thumbnails tied to strong click-through rates.



How to Apply



Send us a message with a short intro about yourself. Share your portfolio or 3 to 5 thumbnail samples. Tell us your fixed rate per thumbnail.

title: Travel Booking & Guest Experience Coordinator (Airbnb/VRBO Specialist)
description:
(Full-Time / Remote,)



Company Overview

9 Line Agency is a specialized travel management company providing corporate and group travel solutions worldwide, with a primary focus on non-conventional lodging options such as Airbnb-style vacation rentals, houses, villas, and apartments. We prioritize exceptional client experiences through personalized, high-touch service, ensuring seamless bookings, clear communication, and hassle-free stays for teams attending conferences, events, or business trips. We are seeking a meticulous, proactive coordinator based in the Philippines to join our growing team and manage the full lifecycle of client accommodations.



Job Summary



We are looking for an incredibly detail-oriented Travel Booking & Guest Experience Coordinator who is passionate about delivering the best possible trip experiences for our corporate clients. You will be the primary point of contact for managing non-conventional lodging bookings (primarily via Airbnb, 
, VRBO, and similar OTAs), handling host communications, tracking trip details closely, and ensuring every aspect of the client's stay runs smoothly from pre-arrival to post-trip follow-up. This role requires strong organizational skills, excellent English communication (written and verbal), and proven experience navigating OTAs to secure optimal options and resolve issues quickly.



Key Responsibilities

Core Booking & Guest Journey Management





Collect and verify check-in instructions, access details (smart locks, key codes, etc.), house rules, and any special notes from hosts/property owners.

Communicate promptly and professionally with hosts/property owners via platfor
ssaging,
, or text to confirm bookings, address questions, and coordinate logistics.

Send clear, customized check-in packets to clients (including instructions, local tips, emergency contacts, Wi-Fi details, and any team-specific notes) well in advance of arrival.

Monitor mid-stay needs and communicate proactively with hosts for services such as trash collection schedules, pool cleaning, housekeeping visits, maintenance requests, or other property-specific updates.

Provide check-out instructions to clients and hosts, ensuring smooth departures and timely feedback collection.

Conduct post-trip follow-up with clients to gather feedback, resolve any issues, and ensure satisfaction for future bookings.



Additional Administrative & Support Tasks



Organize and track invoices, receipts, and payment confirmations from OTAs and hosts for accurate client billing and internal records.

Perform outreach via text,
, or platfor
ssaging to hosts for availability checks, rate negotiations, or special requests.

Create professional flyers, confirmation documents, welcome packets, or simple marketing materials using tools like Canva (for internal client communications or team use).

Maintain detailed trip trackers (spreadsheets or CRM tools) to monitor multiple client trips simultaneously, flagging any potential issues early.

Collaborate with the team to ensure all bookings comply with client policies, budgets, and our service standards.



Qualifications & Requirements



Must-Have Experience:

Proven hands-on experience using OTAs such as Airbnb, VRBO, 
, and similar platforms (as a booker, coordinator, host, or guest services specialist).

At least 1–2 years in travel coordination, vacation rental management, virtual assistance, customer service, or guest experience roles (preferably in short-term rentals or corporate travel).

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills—must be able to track multiple trips without errors.



Skills & Competencies:

Outstanding written and spoken English communication (professional tone, clear instructions, quick responses).

Proficiency with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Gmail), Canva, and basic CRM/spreadsheet tools for tracking.

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to handle last-minute changes or issues calmly.

Time-zone flexibility (may need to respond during US/European business hours for international clients).

Reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, and personal computer/laptop.



Preferred (but not required):

Familiarity with corporate travel needs (group bookings, team stays, event/conference travel).

Previous remote work experience in a fast-paced environment.



Personal Attributes:

Extremely proactive and detail-obsessed—nothing falls through the cracks.

Client-focused mindset with a passion for creating seamless, positive travel experiences.

Honest, reliable, and able to maintain confidentiality with client information.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)

description:

READ THIS FULL JOB DESCRIPTION IF YOU ARE INTERESTED.



You would be in charge of calling leads and signing up clients. I have an assistant that will handle disputes and customer service you would just be in charge of getting new clients by using sales skills to get them to sign up for the service. We also pay weekly bonuses depending on performance. There are not really many details for this position. We need someone that is fluent in English speaking and writing. We will provide leads daily from businesses and individuals. If you are highly motivated and want to make a lot of money, this is the position for you. If you are good in this position, I will pay for you to have more sales training to become better.

If you are interested in this position, write "I am a sales machine" at the top of your application.



Our requirements are only that you must already have credit repair sales experience or a lot of sales experience.

If the clients do not sign up for credit repair now, you will put them into a CRM and they will be sent automatic
s from our drip campaign. You can then follow up with them later. This position does not involve cold calling. All of our leads are warm leads!



Please do not send me any prewritten messages that you send to everyone else.



If you really want this position, prove it.



I am only looking for highly motivated and determined sales professionals.



You must speak Fluent English.

title: Sales Team / Sales Closer
description:
We are looking to hire 6 sales reps to join our growing company. We are gaining close to 100 new clients every month and we want to get up to 250 new clients in total.



I also need 4 Sales Closers for my funding company. We help business owners get funding from different banks and lenders but we will be requiring payments up front soon, and I need Closers to close the deals and collect the payments.



You will be paid every week. You will be paid on an hourly basis, plus a 5% commission on every deal that you sell.  

READ THIS FULL JOB DESCRIPTION IF YOU ARE INTERESTED!



You would be in charge of calling leads and signing up clients. I have an assistant that will handle disputes and customer service you would just be in charge of getting new clients by using sales skills to get them to sign up for the service. We also pay weekly bonuses depending on performance. There are not many details for this position. We need someone that is fluent in English speaking and writing. We will provide warm leads daily from businesses and individuals. If you are highly motivated and want to make a lot of money, this is the position for you. If you are good in this position, we also have a ton of training available for continuous growth.

If you are interested in this position, write "I am a sales addict" at the top of your application.



Our requirements are only that you must already have a lot of sales experience.

If the clients do not sign up for credit repair now, you will put them into a CRM and they will be sent automatic
s and sms from our drip campaign. You can then follow up with them continuously. This position does not involve cold calling. All of our leads are warm leads!



We do daily sales trainings every morning on zoom. 

You must be able to work at least 50 hours per week, Monday through Friday.



Do not send me any prewritten messages that you send to everyone else.



If you really want this position, prove it.



I am only looking for highly motivated and determined sales professionals.



You must speak Fluent English.



You must have previous experience closing credit repair sales or other sales.



You must have great internet.



You must be energetic and Upbeat on the phone with clients.



We already have the warm leads you just need to close them. '



This position pays hourly and commission.

Commission starts at $50 up to $225 per sale on average with a lot of room for increases.



DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT SERIOUS.



1. How long have you done credit repair sales or funding for?

2. What other sales have you done?

3. What other skills do have that make you a good fit for this position?

4. Are you looking for full time or part time work?

5. How much were the products that you were selling?

6. How long have you been in sales all together?



Send over a voice recording with your application.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:

title: Call Setter for Posture and Movement Coach
description:
About Us:

At Cpayne Training, we help people move pain-free and live without limits by identifying the root cause of pain and movement issues—so they can keep up with loved ones, enjoy lasting memories, and build a body that supports them for life. We take a holistic approach to posture, mobility, and strength, blending corrective exercise, biomechanics, and strength training into personalized online coaching programs.



Position Summary:

We’re looking for a highly empathetic and proactive Social Media Appointment Setter to engage with potential clients in our DMs and comments, guide them through our free movement assessment process, and help them take the first step toward resolving their pain. You’ll serve as the first point of contact for people reaching out with movement or pain issues—offering insight, reassurance, and a clear path forward.



This role is ideal for someone with a strong understanding of human movement and a natural ability to connect with others. You should be confident discussing common issues like anterior pelvic tilt, low back pain, and hip dysfunction in a way that feels supportive—not salesy.



Key Responsibilities:



Initiate and manage DM conversations with leads from Instagram,
, and other platforms.



Respond to comments and mentions, and guide interested followers toward booking a free movement assessment.



Ask thoughtful questions to better understand someone's pain or movement issue and provide light guidance to help them feel seen and supported.



Identify when a lead is a good fit and hand them off to our assessment process or coach team.



Log outreach and follow-ups, maintain clean records of conversations.



Follow up with interested leads in a warm, timely, and persistent manner.



Collaborate with our team to optimize messaging and DM scripts based on feedback and performance.



You’re a great fit if you:



Understand or have experience with basic anatomy, posture, and biomechanics (especially as it relates to movement dysfunction, pain, and compensations).



Can explain simple biomechanical issues in a non-technical, empowering way.



Are a strong communicator who listens well and writes clearly with warmth and clarity.



Have a naturally supportive, positive, and empathetic presence.



Are self-motivated, organized, and reliable with follow-up.



Love helping people get unstuck and take action toward improving their lives.



Requirements:



1–2 years experience in sales, client outreach, coaching, or customer support (ideally in the health, fitness, or wellness space)



Basic understanding of corrective exercise, functional training, or movement-based coaching (certifications like NASM-CES, FRC, PRI, or similar are a plus but not required)



Comfort using Instagram and
 for client interaction



Familiarity with Cpayne Training’s mission, programs, and tone (visit our content to get a feel)







Available for at least 15–20 hours per week



Important: The hours we are looking to fill are between 3pm and 8pm Central Standard Time



Bonus: Experience using DM automation tools, CRM, or chat-based outreach strategies like GHL



How to Apply:

Please respond directly with a short explanation about why you are the best fit for this role. Use the subject line: “Appointment Setter Application – [Your Name]” and include:



Also include: How your experience and background make you a good fit



What stood out to you about Cpayne Training



A sample DM reply you’d send to someone who says:

“I’ve had hip pain for months, stretching helps a bit but it always comes back. Not sure if I need to rest or push through it.”

title: Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Location: Remote

Working Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (ET)



About This Role

We are a U.S.-based promotional products company with a structured, rule-based workflow.

Our daily operations involve handling
s, managing quotes, tracking orders, and maintaining clean systems.

This role is not creative and not a growth/leadership role. It is an execution role that requires accuracy, consistency, and strict rule-following.

If you enjoy working with clear SOPs, checklists, and structured processes, this role will be a great fit.

If you prefer flexibility, improvisation, or constantly changing rules, this role is not suitable.



Core Responsibilities (High-Level)

• Manage and organize daily operational tasks following established SOPs

• Review and prioritize
s from suppliers and clients

• Support quote and order processes with accurate data entry and tracking

• Maintain clean, well-organized files and records

• Prepare clear, professional English drafts for internal and client communication

• Follow instructions precisely and ask clarification questions when needed

• Provide daily work summaries and status updates

(Detailed step-by-step training and SOPs are provided after onboarding.)



What We Value (Non-Negotiable)

1) Extreme Attention to Detail

• You naturally double-check your work

• Small inconsistencies bother you

• Accuracy matters more than speed

2) Strong Rule-Following Ability

• You prefer clear instructions and SOPs

• You do not “improvise” when rules exist

• You are comfortable repeating structured tasks daily

3) Excellent Written English

• You can clearly rewrite supplier messages into professional client-facing English

• You understand tone, clarity, and business context

4) Fast Learner Within Structure

• You can learn SOPs quickly

• You apply instructions consistently once trained

5) Reliability & Stability

• You are seeking a long-term, stable role

• You are comfortable with repetitive, structured work



What This Role Is NOT

• Not a creative or strategy role

• Not a sales or leadership role

• Not a flexible-hours or part-time role

This is a professional execution role within a defined system.



What You Do NOT Need

• Promotional products industry experience

• Advanced technical skills

All systems and workflows are trained internally.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

Only candidates who follow instructions exactly will be considered.



Step 1 – Written Application

Please answer all of the following:

1. Introduce yourself in 5–7 sentences

2. Describe a role where accuracy and rule-following were critical

3. Do you prefer working with strict SOPs or flexible tasks? Why?

4. Rate your written English ability (1–10)

5. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time, Monday–Friday



Step 2 – English Voice or Video (1–2 minutes)

Please record a short English voice or video introduction including:

• Your name and background

• Why you are detail-oriented

• Why you are looking for a long-term, stable role



Step 3 – Required Subject Line

Subject: VA – Rule-Focused & Detail-Oriented

Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.

s

 outreach tools

 for maintaining communication with an existing customer

title: Real Estate and Mortgage Assistant
description:
30+ veteran of the mortgage and real estate fields is seeking experienced VA with hands on, demonstrable experience in the mortgage origination and real estate assistant fields. Typical tasks would include: 

Mortgage side: Gathering loan documents (tax returns, pay stubs, W2s, bank statements, etc). Opening PDF files, naming docs and saving them in my Google Drive location. Researcing underwriting guidelines thorough provided Ai driven database. Calling mortgage leads to generate new applications. 

Real Estate Side: Creating online searches based on customer provided criteria, calling leads to generate business, managing/tracking the transaction from signing, through contingencies all the way through closing (like a transaction coordinator would do). If you're still reading this, please start with your response with, don't worry Steve, I read everything!

A bit about me: I am the founder/owner of a small mortgage company based in Boca Raton, FLorida (USA). We offer a wide array of loans throughout the state of Florida as well as some other loans nationwide. I am also an active licensed Realtor. This is why I would love to find a great, honest VA with a positive attitude, who can take direction and we can succeed together. I am happy to provide quarterly bonuses based on performance. When I succeed, you succeed...we help each other and our families in this way. Looking forward to hearing from you soon!

title: Amazon Project Manager
description:
Amazon Project Manager



Company: Flagship Growth

Location: Remote

Hours: Full-time | 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM PST (required)

Required Experience: 3–5+ years Amazon Seller Central experience

Tools: ClickUp experience required



About Flagship Growth



Flagship Growth is a performance-driven Amazon growth agency that partners with brands to scale revenue through advertising, creative optimization, listing improvements, and operational excellence.



We work with fast-growing consumer brands and manage the operational execution required to scale successfully on Amazon.



We are hiring an Amazon Project Manager to ensure tasks, projects, and deliverables across our client accounts stay organized and on track.



Role Overview

- The Amazon Project Manager is responsible for managing project execution across multiple Amazon brand accounts. This role ensures that all internal teams (advertising, creative, catalog, inventory, and account management) are aligned and executing tasks on time. You will be responsible for managing workflows inside ClickUp, tracking deliverables, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks. This role requires strong Amazon Seller Central experience so you can understand account priorities, listing changes, inventory issues, and operational workflows.



Key Responsibilities

- Amazon Account Project Management

- Manage operational workflows across multiple Amazon brand accounts

- Track listing updates, advertising initiatives, inventory tasks, and operational projects

- Ensure client deliverables are executed on schedule

- Identify and escalate issues that may impact account performance



ClickUp Workflow Management

- Build and manage project boards inside ClickUp

- Assign tasks, manage deadlines, and maintain organized workflows

- Create recurring tasks and project templates

- Maintain visibility across all account activity



Cross-Team Coordination

- Work closely with internal teams including:

- Amazon Advertising

- Listing / Catalog Management

- Creative Team

- Inventory & Operations

- Account Managers

- Ensure teams are aligned and executing against priorities.



Internal Communication & Follow-Up

- Track action items fro
etings and Slack conversations

- Follow up with tea
mbers to ensure tasks are completed

- Maintain clear internal documentation of priorities and timelines



Process Optimization

- Help improve internal workflows and systems

- Identify operational inefficiencies

- Suggest improvements to task management and team coordination



Requirements

- 3–5+ years experience working with Amazon Seller Central

- Strong understanding of Amazon operations including listings, advertising, inventory, and account health

- Experience using ClickUp for project management

- Excellent organizational and follow-up skills

- Strong written and verbal English communication

- Ability to manage multiple brands and projects simultaneously

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced agency environment



Work Schedule

- This role must work 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM PST to align with our team and client communication schedule.

- Reliable internet and a professional remote workspace are required.



What Success Looks Like

- Projects stay organized and on schedule

- Teams clearly understand ownership and deadlines

- Client deliverables are completed on time

- Account operations run smoothly without missed tasks

- Internal workflows stay structured and efficient



Compensation

- Full-time role

- Competitive salary based on experience

- Long-term opportunity within a fast-growing Amazon agency



How to Apply



Please include:

- Summary of your Amazon Seller Central experience (3–5+ years)

- Answer the screening questions below 

- Confirmation that you can work 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM PST

- Why you would be a strong fit for this role



Amazon Project Manager — Screening Questions



1?? Amazon Seller Central Experience - How many years have you worked inside Amazon Seller Central?

Please list the specific tasks you have personally handled:

- Listing creation or updates

- Inventory management / shipment creation

- Advertising management

- Case logs with Amazon support

- Account health monitoring

- Flat file uploads



(Briefly describe your experience.)



2?? Seller Central Navigation Test - Where in Seller Central would you go to perform the following tasks?



A. Create an FBA shipment

B. Check stranded inventory

C. Download a business report

D. Check suppressed listings



(We are looking for the exact Seller Central sections you would navigate to.)



3?? Amazon Problem-Solving Scenario - A client’s best-selling product suddenly becomes suppressed due to a compliance issue.

What steps would you take to:

- Identify the problem

- Resolve the issue

- Prevent it from happening again



4?? ClickUp Experience - How have you used ClickUp in your previous role?

Please explain:

- How you organized projects

- How you assigned tasks

- How you tracked deadlines

- Any automations or templates you created



5?? Task Management Scenario: You are managing 8 Amazon brands and suddenly receive:

- 3 listing updates

- 2 urgent inventory issues

- 1 advertising request

- 1 client asking for reporting

How would you prioritize and manage these tasks?



6?? Attention to Detail Check - To confirm you read this job description, please include the word: “Flagship” in the first sentence of your response.



7?? Work Schedule Confirmation - This role requires working 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM PST. Can you consistently work during these hours?

* Processor: At least the latest version of ICore-i3 quad-core or later versions

* Memory: At least 4GB RAM

* Storage Space/Capacity: 250GB or higher

* Hard Drive: preferably SSD

* Operating System: Windows 10, Mac OS X 10.8 or later

* Must have a backup Internet, backup headset, and backup power source 

* Quiet working environment - no background noise

* USB Headset with Noise Canceling Feature

* Web Camera



Application Process: 

1. Please ensure a high-quality, professional photograph is attached directly to your Curriculum Vitae (CV)

2. Complete the free DISC Personality Test at the following link: 
/disc-personality-test/ 

3. Merge your DISC Assessment result (only the result pages) with your CV to create one single PDF file

4. Send your a brief video introduction of yourself



* Send the merged CV/DISC result file and the video introduction to 
 



Important Note:

Applicants who are not able to follow the above instructions will be automatically screened out. Thank you.

title: SEO Implementation Specialist – Execute Strategy, Drive Results
description:
Growth & Marketing Agency | HOA/Community Association Management Industry | Remote**



---



About This Opportunity



We're a specialized growth and marketing agency serving HOA management companies across North America. Our SEO strategist develops comprehensive optimization roadmaps—**we need an experienced implementer to bring those strategies to life.**



This is a high-impact execution role for an SEO professional who excels at technical implementation, enjoys solving complex optimization challenges, and takes pride in delivering measurable results.



---



 The Role



As our SEO Implementation Specialist, you'll work directly from our strategic playbooks to optimize client websites, resolve technical issues, and drive organic performance improvements that support lead generation goals.



Primary Responsibilities:



**Strategic Execution**

- Implement SEO recommendations from internal audits and strategic reports

- Resolve technical issues affecting site crawling, indexing, and performance

- Execute on-page optimization across metadata, heading structures, and schema markup

- Develop and maintain robust internal linking architectures supporting topic clusters



**Technical Optimization**

- Manage and optimize Rank Math configurations, including schema implementation, sitemap management, and automation workflows

- Monitor and improve Core Web Vitals, site speed, and overall technical performance

- Troubleshoot technical issues involving HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as needed

- Ensure proper indexing and crawlability across all client properties



**Performance & Reporting**

- Utilize SEMrush for competitive analysis, issue identification, and progress tracking

- Support link-building initiatives with a focus on quality and relevance

- Optimize content for traditional and AI-powered search visibility

- Align all technical implementations with quarterly KPI objectives



**Continuous Improvement**

- Identify additional optimization opportunities within existing strategic frameworks

- Provide SEO guidance to content writers on E-E-A-T principles, keyword integration, and structural best practices

- Recommend tactical improvements that enhance current strategies



---



Required Qualifications



Technical Expertise:

- **Expert-level proficiency with Rank Math** (required)

- **Advanced SEMrush capabilities** (required)

- Strong command of Google Search Console and Google Analytics

- Comprehensive technical SEO knowledge: Core Web Vitals, schema markup, site speed optimization, indexing protocols

- WordPress development experience

- Ability to troubleshoot front-end code (HTML/CSS/JavaScript)



Professional Skills:

- Demonstrated track record of successful SEO implementation

- Exceptional attention to detail and commitment to accuracy

- Strong organizational skills with ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Excellent written and verbal communication abilities

- Self-directed work style with strong accountability



Preferred Qualifications:

- Proven success with local SEO and map pack optimization

- Experience in HOA/CAM industry or home services sector

- Familiarity with 
 and Slack

- Background in link-building strategy and execution

- Knowledge of AI search optimization techniques



---



Success Metrics



Performance in this role is evaluated based on concrete outcomes:



- **Accuracy and completeness** of audit issue resolution

- **Consistent execution** of SEO playbook across all client accounts

- **Organic performance improvements** aligned with lead generation objectives

- **Increased visibility** in both traditional and AI-powered search results

- **Achievement of quarterly KPIs** established by our SEO strategist



We prioritize qualified lead generation and meaningful business results over vanity metrics.



---



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are a detail-oriented professional who:

- Thrives on implementation and technical problem-solving

- Works efficiently from defined strategies and frameworks

- Maintains strong organizational systems and follow-through

- Proactively identifies optimization opportunities

- Communicates clearly and meets commitments consistently

- Takes ownership of results



---



Application Requirements



Please submit the following materials:



1. **Resume** highlighting your SEO implementation experience and quantifiable results

2. **Portfolio or case studies** demonstrating your SEO work

3. **Rank Math examples** with documented before/after results (required)

4. **Cover letter** explaining your interest in this role and your approach to SEO implementation

5. **Video Introduction** share about yourself and past experience 



---



About Working With Us



- Partner with a specialized agency focused exclusively on the HOA/CAM industry

- Clear strategic direction and defined success metrics

- Opportunity to make meaningful impact on client growth

- Remote work flexibility

- Collaborative, results-oriented team environment



---



We're seeking a dependable, skilled professional who can transform strategy into tangible results. If this describes your expertise and work style, we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Digital Events & Operations Assistant
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented, reliable Digital Events & Operations Assistant to support the backend delivery of online classes, webinars, and
 communications.

This is an assistant-level role suited to someone highly organised, technically confident, and comfortable working behind the scenes to ensure seamless online experiences. The ideal candidate is based in — or able to work within — Asia Pacific time zones, with availability to support live sessions as required.



Key Responsibilities



Backend Event Setup

- Create and manage online event listings and registration pages

- Ensure accurate backend setup and smooth participant experience

-
 Campaign Execution 

- Build and schedule campaigns in Campaign Manager

- Segment lists and manage subscriber data

- Monitor open rates, click-through rates, and campaign performance

- Provide basic performance insights and recommendations



Weekly Metrics Reporting

- Track class and event registrations, attendance, engagement, and
 performance

- Prepare clear weekly summary reports

- Flag trends or technical issues



Live Zoom & Webinar AV Support

- Host and facilitate Zoom classes and webinars

- Support AI translation tools when required

- Manage class recordings 

- Provide live tech support during sessions

- Support screen sharing and presentation management for the teacher



Vimeo & Content Management

- Upload and organise class recordings on Vimeo

- Apply light edits (trimming, basic formatting)

- Manage privacy settings and access links

- Shareable Assets & Logistics

- Create calendar add-to links (Google, Outlook, etc.)

- Prepare shareable event assets for distribution



Ideal Candidate

- Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

- Comfortable using Zoom, Vimeo, Salesforce, and
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Campaign Manager preferred

- Calm and solution-oriented during live events

- Is aligned with our mission to elevate global consciousness

- Team Player 

- Strong written communication skills

- Able to work some evenings to accommodate Asia Pacific time zones



Role Details

- Hyrbid position: expectation to work on-site at least 3pw in Metro Manila 

- Assistant-level role

- Flexible hours with required availability for certain live events in APAC time zones

- Ongoing contract opportunity





If you are tech-savvy, proactive, and enjoy supporting high-quality online learning experiences, we’d love to connect.
